• before the afternoon heat made it difficult for them to stand in line = time clause dengan dummy object it.
• to stand in line = infinitive complement.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. would not have waited so long outside the gate
Bagian ini benar karena sesuai dengan conditional type 3. If-clause memakai had opened, maka result clause memakai would have + V3.

B. could have entered the exhibition hall
Bagian ini juga tepat. Could have entered menunjukkan kemungkinan yang tidak terjadi di masa lalu.

C. made it difficult for them
Struktur ini benar sebagai awal pola make it + adjective + for someone. It di sini adalah dummy object.

D. standing in line
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Setelah made it difficult for them, bentuk yang dibutuhkan adalah infinitive: to stand in line.

Jebakan TOEFL
Gerund sering terasa natural secara makna, tetapi tidak selalu cocok dengan pola struktur. Dalam pola make it difficult for someone, lanjutannya adalah to + verb.

Catatan cepat
made it difficult for them to stand, bukan made it difficult for them standing.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *If the museum had opened its side entrance earlier = if-clause conditional type 3.*
- *visitors would not have waited so long outside the gate = result clause pertama.*
- *elderly guests could have entered the exhibition hall = result clause kedua.*
- before the afternoon heat made it difficult for them to stand in line = time clause dengan dummy object it.
- *to stand in line = infinitive complement.*
correctedSentence: If the museum had opened its side entrance earlier, visitors would not have waited so long outside the gate, and elderly guests could have entered the exhibition hall before the afternoon heat made it difficult for them to stand in line.

questionText: The city’s decision [A] to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue was welcomed by students who ride to school, although several shop owners expressed [B] concern that the new barriers might [C] obstruction deliveries during the morning rush [D] near the market.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji word form setelah modal. Setelah modal seperti might, can, should, atau must, verb harus berbentuk base verb.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang perlu diperiksa adalah:

might obstruction deliveries

Kata might adalah modal. Setelah modal, bahasa Inggris membutuhkan verb dasar, bukan noun. Obstruction adalah noun yang berarti “hambatan” atau “penghalangan.” Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang dibutuhkan adalah verb “menghambat,” yaitu obstruct.

Jadi bentuk yang benar adalah:

might obstruct deliveries
explanation.whyCorrect:
obstruction deliveries
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Setelah modal might, kata yang dibutuhkan adalah verb dasar. Obstruction adalah noun, sehingga harus diganti menjadi obstruct.

optionAnalysis.A:
to expand the bicycle lanes
Bagian ini benar. Decision dapat diikuti infinitive to expand untuk menjelaskan keputusan apa yang dimaksud.
optionAnalysis.B:
concern
Bagian ini juga tepat. Expressed concern adalah collocation yang natural.
optionAnalysis.C:
obstruction deliveries
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Setelah modal might, kata yang dibutuhkan adalah verb dasar. Obstruction adalah noun, sehingga harus diganti menjadi obstruct.
optionAnalysis.D:
near the market
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi.

explanation.toeflTrap: Bentuk noun dan verb sering mirip, tetapi posisinya menentukan fungsi. Setelah modal, jangan gunakan noun; gunakan base verb.
explanation.quickNote: might obstruct, bukan might obstruction.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W23 — Word Form: Noun vs Verb

Soal
The city’s decision [A] to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue was welcomed by students who ride to school, although several shop owners expressed [B] concern that the new barriers might [C] obstruction deliveries during the morning rush [D] near the market.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
obstruction

Perbaikan
obstruct

Kalimat benar
The city’s decision to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue was welcomed by students who ride to school, although several shop owners expressed concern that the new barriers might obstruct deliveries during the morning rush near the market.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji word form setelah modal. Setelah modal seperti might, can, should, atau must, verb harus berbentuk base verb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang perlu diperiksa adalah:

might obstruction deliveries

Kata might adalah modal. Setelah modal, bahasa Inggris membutuhkan verb dasar, bukan noun. Obstruction adalah noun yang berarti “hambatan” atau “penghalangan.” Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang dibutuhkan adalah verb “menghambat,” yaitu obstruct.

Jadi bentuk yang benar adalah:

might obstruct deliveries

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The city’s decision to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue = subject.
• was welcomed = passive verb phrase.
• by students who ride to school = agent phrase + relative clause.
• although several shop owners expressed concern = contrast clause.
• that the new barriers might obstruct deliveries = noun clause sebagai object dari concern.
• during the morning rush near the market = time/place phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. to expand the bicycle lanes
Bagian ini benar. Decision dapat diikuti infinitive to expand untuk menjelaskan keputusan apa yang dimaksud.

B. concern
Bagian ini juga tepat. Expressed concern adalah collocation yang natural.

C. obstruction deliveries
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Setelah modal might, kata yang dibutuhkan adalah verb dasar. Obstruction adalah noun, sehingga harus diganti menjadi obstruct.

D. near the market
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi.

Jebakan TOEFL
Bentuk noun dan verb sering mirip, tetapi posisinya menentukan fungsi. Setelah modal, jangan gunakan noun; gunakan base verb.

Catatan cepat
might obstruct, bukan might obstruction.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The city’s decision to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue = subject.*
- *was welcomed = passive verb phrase.*
- *by students who ride to school = agent phrase + relative clause.*
- *although several shop owners expressed concern = contrast clause.*
- *that the new barriers might obstruct deliveries = noun clause sebagai object dari concern.*
- *during the morning rush near the market = time/place phrase.*
correctedSentence: The city’s decision to expand the bicycle lanes along the main avenue was welcomed by students who ride to school, although several shop owners expressed concern that the new barriers might obstruct deliveries during the morning rush near the market.

questionText: The librarian placed [A] several old photograph from the town’s early years in a glass case near the entrance, where visitors could compare them with modern pictures of the same streets [B] taken from similar angles [C] during the annual heritage walk [D] last summer.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji plural countable noun setelah quantifier several. Several harus diikuti noun plural.
explanation.reasoning:
Kata photograph adalah countable noun. Karena sebelumnya ada several, noun ini harus dibuat plural:

several old photographs

Bukan:

several old photograph

Setelah noun diperbaiki menjadi photographs, pronoun them juga menjadi masuk akal karena them merujuk pada photographs yang plural.
explanation.whyCorrect:
several old photograph
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Several membutuhkan countable plural noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah several old photographs.

optionAnalysis.A:
several old photograph
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Several membutuhkan countable plural noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah several old photographs.
optionAnalysis.B:
taken from similar angles
Bagian ini benar sebagai reduced passive modifier dari pictures that were taken. Pictures menerima aksi “diambil.”
optionAnalysis.C:
during the annual heritage walk
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan waktu kegiatan.
optionAnalysis.D:
last summer
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu tambahan.

explanation.toeflTrap: Several, many, few, dan a number of biasanya membutuhkan noun plural. Jangan biarkan noun setelahnya tetap singular.
explanation.quickNote: several photographs, bukan several photograph.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W24 — Countable Plural after Several

Soal
The librarian placed [A] several old photograph from the town’s early years in a glass case near the entrance, where visitors could compare them with modern pictures of the same streets [B] taken from similar angles [C] during the annual heritage walk [D] last summer.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
several old photograph

Perbaikan
several old photographs

Kalimat benar
The librarian placed several old photographs from the town’s early years in a glass case near the entrance, where visitors could compare them with modern pictures of the same streets taken from similar angles during the annual heritage walk last summer.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji plural countable noun setelah quantifier several. Several harus diikuti noun plural.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kata photograph adalah countable noun. Karena sebelumnya ada several, noun ini harus dibuat plural:

several old photographs

Bukan:

several old photograph

Setelah noun diperbaiki menjadi photographs, pronoun them juga menjadi masuk akal karena them merujuk pada photographs yang plural.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The librarian = subject.
• placed = verb.
• several old photographs from the town’s early years = object.
• in a glass case near the entrance = place phrase.
• where visitors could compare them with modern pictures... = clause yang menjelaskan lokasi/situasi.
• taken from similar angles = reduced passive modifier.
• during the annual heritage walk last summer = keterangan waktu.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. several old photograph
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Several membutuhkan countable plural noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah several old photographs.

B. taken from similar angles
Bagian ini benar sebagai reduced passive modifier dari pictures that were taken. Pictures menerima aksi “diambil.”

C. during the annual heritage walk
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan waktu kegiatan.

D. last summer
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu tambahan.

Jebakan TOEFL
Several, many, few, dan a number of biasanya membutuhkan noun plural. Jangan biarkan noun setelahnya tetap singular.

Catatan cepat
several photographs, bukan several photograph.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The librarian = subject.*
- *placed = verb.*
- *several old photographs from the town’s early years = object.*
- *in a glass case near the entrance = place phrase.*
- *where visitors could compare them with modern pictures... = clause yang menjelaskan lokasi/situasi.*
- *taken from similar angles = reduced passive modifier.*
- *during the annual heritage walk last summer = keterangan waktu.*
correctedSentence: The librarian placed several old photographs from the town’s early years in a glass case near the entrance, where visitors could compare them with modern pictures of the same streets taken from similar angles during the annual heritage walk last summer.

questionText: The local singer [A] whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children [B] who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments [C] which she donated them are still used by students [D] who practice there every afternoon.

choices.A: whose voice became famous after a street performance
choices.B: who could not afford private lessons

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji relative clause ketika relative pronoun sudah berfungsi sebagai object. Jika which sudah mewakili object, jangan tambahkan object pronoun lagi.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang bermasalah adalah:

several instruments which she donated them

Dalam relative clause itu, which merujuk pada several instruments. Secara fungsi, which sudah menjadi object dari verb donated. Jadi tidak perlu menambahkan them.

Bentuk lengkapnya bisa dibayangkan seperti ini:

She donated several instruments.

Ketika several instruments dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan di depan, bentuknya menjadi:

several instruments which she donated

Bukan:

several instruments which she donated them
explanation.whyCorrect:
which she donated them
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Which sudah menjadi object dari donated, sehingga them menjadi object tambahan yang berlebihan. Bentuk yang benar cukup which she donated.

optionAnalysis.A:
whose voice became famous after a street performance
Bagian ini benar. Whose menunjukkan hubungan kepemilikan: suara penyanyi itu menjadi terkenal.
optionAnalysis.B:
who could not afford private lessons
Bagian ini juga tepat karena who merujuk pada children, yaitu manusia.
optionAnalysis.C:
which she donated them
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Which sudah menjadi object dari donated, sehingga them menjadi object tambahan yang berlebihan. Bentuk yang benar cukup which she donated.
optionAnalysis.D:
who practice there every afternoon
Bagian ini benar karena who merujuk pada students, dan practice sesuai dengan subject plural students.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam relative clause, peserta sering menambahkan pronoun lagi karena terbawa pola bahasa Indonesia. Dalam bahasa Inggris formal, jangan menulis the instruments which she donated them.
explanation.quickNote: which she donated, bukan which she donated them.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W25 — Redundant Object Pronoun in Relative Clause

Soal
The local singer [A] whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children [B] who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments [C] which she donated them are still used by students [D] who practice there every afternoon.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
which she donated them

Perbaikan
which she donated / that she donated / she donated

Kalimat benar
The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments which she donated are still used by students who practice there every afternoon.

Alternatif yang juga benar
The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments that she donated are still used by students who practice there every afternoon.

The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments she donated are still used by students who practice there every afternoon.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji relative clause ketika relative pronoun sudah berfungsi sebagai object. Jika which sudah mewakili object, jangan tambahkan object pronoun lagi.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang bermasalah adalah:

several instruments which she donated them

Dalam relative clause itu, which merujuk pada several instruments. Secara fungsi, which sudah menjadi object dari verb donated. Jadi tidak perlu menambahkan them.

Bentuk lengkapnya bisa dibayangkan seperti ini:

She donated several instruments.

Ketika several instruments dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan di depan, bentuknya menjadi:

several instruments which she donated

Bukan:

several instruments which she donated them

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance = subject phrase pertama.
• later founded a music school for children = verb phrase pertama.
• who could not afford private lessons = relative clause yang menjelaskan children.
• several instruments which she donated = subject phrase kedua.
• are still used = passive verb phrase.
• by students who practice there every afternoon = agent phrase + relative clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. whose voice became famous after a street performance
Bagian ini benar. Whose menunjukkan hubungan kepemilikan: suara penyanyi itu menjadi terkenal.

B. who could not afford private lessons
Bagian ini juga tepat karena who merujuk pada children, yaitu manusia.

C. which she donated them
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Which sudah menjadi object dari donated, sehingga them menjadi object tambahan yang berlebihan. Bentuk yang benar cukup which she donated.

D. who practice there every afternoon
Bagian ini benar karena who merujuk pada students, dan practice sesuai dengan subject plural students.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam relative clause, peserta sering menambahkan pronoun lagi karena terbawa pola bahasa Indonesia. Dalam bahasa Inggris formal, jangan menulis the instruments which she donated them.

Catatan cepat
which she donated, bukan which she donated them.

grammarPattern: Redundant Object Pronoun in Relative Clause
errorFocus: Redundant Object Pronoun in Relative Clause
sentenceStructureExplanation:
- The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance = subject phrase pertama.
- *later founded a music school for children = verb phrase pertama.*
- *who could not afford private lessons = relative clause yang menjelaskan children.*
- *several instruments which she donated = subject phrase kedua.*
- *are still used = passive verb phrase.*
- *by students who practice there every afternoon = agent phrase + relative clause.*
correction: which she donated / that she donated / she donated
correctedSentence: The local singer whose voice became famous after a street performance later founded a music school for children who could not afford private lessons, and several instruments which she donated are still used by students who practice there every afternoon.

questionText: Before leaving the national park, the guide reminded the hikers [A] about keeping a safe distance from wild monkeys, [B] not feeding any animals near the trail, and [C] to report damaged signs to the ranger station [D] before sunset.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji parallel structure setelah preposition about. Setelah preposition, bentuk verbal harus berupa gerund.
explanation.reasoning:
Guide mengingatkan para pendaki tentang tiga hal:

keeping a safe distance
not feeding any animals
reporting damaged signs

Semua kegiatan itu berada di bawah preposition about. Karena about adalah preposition, verb setelahnya harus menjadi gerund atau V-ing.

Bagian pertama sudah benar:

about keeping...

Bagian kedua juga benar:

not feeding...

Maka bagian ketiga tidak boleh berubah menjadi to report. Bentuk yang sejajar adalah reporting.
explanation.whyCorrect:
to report damaged signs
Kesalahannya ada di sini. To report tidak sejajar dengan keeping dan not feeding. Setelah about, bentuk yang benar adalah reporting.

optionAnalysis.A:
about keeping a safe distance
Bagian ini benar karena keeping adalah gerund setelah preposition about.
optionAnalysis.B:
not feeding any animals
Bagian ini juga tepat dan sejajar dengan keeping. Bentuk negatif gerund adalah not + V-ing.
optionAnalysis.C:
to report damaged signs
Kesalahannya ada di sini. To report tidak sejajar dengan keeping dan not feeding. Setelah about, bentuk yang benar adalah reporting.
optionAnalysis.D:
before sunset
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

explanation.toeflTrap: Jika satu preposition menaungi beberapa kegiatan, semua bentuk verbal setelahnya harus mengikuti pola yang sama: preposition + gerund.
explanation.quickNote: about keeping, not feeding, and reporting.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W26 — Preposition + Gerund

Soal
Before leaving the national park, the guide reminded the hikers [A] about keeping a safe distance from wild monkeys, [B] not feeding any animals near the trail, and [C] to report damaged signs to the ranger station [D] before sunset.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
to report

Perbaikan
reporting

Kalimat benar
Before leaving the national park, the guide reminded the hikers about keeping a safe distance from wild monkeys, not feeding any animals near the trail, and reporting damaged signs to the ranger station before sunset.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji parallel structure setelah preposition about. Setelah preposition, bentuk verbal harus berupa gerund.

Cara membaca kalimat
Guide mengingatkan para pendaki tentang tiga hal:

keeping a safe distance
not feeding any animals
reporting damaged signs

Semua kegiatan itu berada di bawah preposition about. Karena about adalah preposition, verb setelahnya harus menjadi gerund atau V-ing.

Bagian pertama sudah benar:

about keeping...

Bagian kedua juga benar:

not feeding...

Maka bagian ketiga tidak boleh berubah menjadi to report. Bentuk yang sejajar adalah reporting.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Before leaving the national park = introductory phrase.
• the guide = subject.
• reminded = verb.
• the hikers = object.
• about keeping..., not feeding..., and reporting... = parallel gerund phrases.
• to the ranger station before sunset = destination/time phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. about keeping a safe distance
Bagian ini benar karena keeping adalah gerund setelah preposition about.

B. not feeding any animals
Bagian ini juga tepat dan sejajar dengan keeping. Bentuk negatif gerund adalah not + V-ing.

C. to report damaged signs
Kesalahannya ada di sini. To report tidak sejajar dengan keeping dan not feeding. Setelah about, bentuk yang benar adalah reporting.

D. before sunset
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

Jebakan TOEFL
Jika satu preposition menaungi beberapa kegiatan, semua bentuk verbal setelahnya harus mengikuti pola yang sama: preposition + gerund.

Catatan cepat
about keeping, not feeding, and reporting.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Before leaving the national park = introductory phrase.*
- *the guide = subject.*
- *reminded = verb.*
- *the hikers = object.*
- *about keeping..., not feeding..., and reporting... = parallel gerund phrases.*
- *to the ranger station before sunset = destination/time phrase.*
correctedSentence: Before leaving the national park, the guide reminded the hikers about keeping a safe distance from wild monkeys, not feeding any animals near the trail, and reporting damaged signs to the ranger station before sunset.

questionText: Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use, the heavy piano [A] should not be moved across it until the damaged boards [B] replace and the floor [C] is inspected by a carpenter [D] from the village.

explanation.summary: *Soal ini menguji passive voice. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya harus be + V3.*
explanation.reasoning:
Subject dalam until-clause adalah:

the damaged boards

Papan yang rusak tidak melakukan aksi replace. Papan itu diganti oleh seseorang. Jadi bentuknya harus pasif:

are replaced

Bagian setelahnya memberi petunjuk kuat karena sudah memakai bentuk pasif yang benar:

the floor is inspected

Karena boards plural, be yang tepat adalah are. Jadi dua bagian dalam until-clause menjadi sejajar:

the damaged boards are replaced
and the floor is inspected
explanation.whyCorrect:
replace
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Boards menerima aksi “diganti,” bukan melakukan aksi mengganti. Bentuk pasif yang benar adalah are replaced.

optionAnalysis.A:
should not be moved
Bagian ini benar. Piano menerima aksi dipindahkan, sehingga should not be moved sudah membentuk modal passive yang tepat.
optionAnalysis.B:
replace
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Boards menerima aksi “diganti,” bukan melakukan aksi mengganti. Bentuk pasif yang benar adalah are replaced.
optionAnalysis.C:
is inspected
Bagian ini benar. Floor singular dan menerima aksi inspeksi, sehingga is inspected tepat.
optionAnalysis.D:
from the village
Frasa ini juga benar sebagai keterangan yang menjelaskan asal carpenter.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kalau ada dua aksi sejajar dalam clause yang sama, TOEFL sering membuat salah satunya aktif padahal seharusnya pasif. Di sini bentuknya harus boards are replaced and floor is inspected.
explanation.quickNote: boards are replaced, bukan boards replace.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W27 — Passive Voice with Modal / Passive Parallel Structure

Soal
Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use, the heavy piano [A] should not be moved across it until the damaged boards [B] replace and the floor [C] is inspected by a carpenter [D] from the village.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
replace

Perbaikan
are replaced

Kalimat benar
Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use, the heavy piano should not be moved across it until the damaged boards are replaced and the floor is inspected by a carpenter from the village.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji passive voice. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya harus be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Subject dalam until-clause adalah:

the damaged boards

Papan yang rusak tidak melakukan aksi replace. Papan itu diganti oleh seseorang. Jadi bentuknya harus pasif:

are replaced

Bagian setelahnya memberi petunjuk kuat karena sudah memakai bentuk pasif yang benar:

the floor is inspected

Karena boards plural, be yang tepat adalah are. Jadi dua bagian dalam until-clause menjadi sejajar:

the damaged boards are replaced
and the floor is inspected

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use = reason clause.
• the heavy piano should not be moved across it = main clause dengan modal passive.
• until the damaged boards are replaced = time clause pertama.
• and the floor is inspected by a carpenter = time clause kedua yang sejajar.
• from the village = prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan carpenter.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. should not be moved
Bagian ini benar. Piano menerima aksi dipindahkan, sehingga should not be moved sudah membentuk modal passive yang tepat.

B. replace
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Boards menerima aksi “diganti,” bukan melakukan aksi mengganti. Bentuk pasif yang benar adalah are replaced.

C. is inspected
Bagian ini benar. Floor singular dan menerima aksi inspeksi, sehingga is inspected tepat.

D. from the village
Frasa ini juga benar sebagai keterangan yang menjelaskan asal carpenter.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kalau ada dua aksi sejajar dalam clause yang sama, TOEFL sering membuat salah satunya aktif padahal seharusnya pasif. Di sini bentuknya harus boards are replaced and floor is inspected.

Catatan cepat
boards are replaced, bukan boards replace.

grammarPattern: Passive Voice with Modal / Passive Parallel Structure
errorFocus: Passive Voice with Modal / Passive Parallel Structure
sentenceStructureExplanation:
- Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use = reason clause.
- the heavy piano should not be moved across it = main clause dengan modal passive.
- *until the damaged boards are replaced = time clause pertama.*
- *and the floor is inspected by a carpenter = time clause kedua yang sejajar.*
- *from the village = prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan carpenter.*
correctedSentence: Because the wooden stage in the community hall had become weak after years of use, the heavy piano should not be moved across it until the damaged boards are replaced and the floor is inspected by a carpenter from the village.

questionText: The travel agency gave the visitors [A] detailed information about the mountain route, advised them [B] to carry extra water during the dry season, and provided [C] several maps that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts, but it did not offer [D] many useful advices about local customs.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji uncountable noun. Advice adalah uncountable noun dalam bahasa Inggris standar, sehingga tidak dibuat plural menjadi advices dan tidak memakai many.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

many useful advices

Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “nasihat-nasihat” atau “saran-saran” terasa wajar. Namun dalam bahasa Inggris standar, advice tidak dihitung sebagai advices dalam konteks umum. Karena advice uncountable, kita tidak memakai many dan tidak menambahkan -s.

Bentuk yang lebih tepat adalah:

much useful advice

atau:

a lot of useful advice

Kalau ingin membuatnya countable, perlu unit seperti:

many useful pieces of advice
explanation.whyCorrect:
many useful advices
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Advice adalah uncountable noun, jadi tidak memakai many dan tidak menjadi advices. Bentuk yang benar adalah much useful advice atau a lot of useful advice.

optionAnalysis.A:
detailed information
Bagian ini benar. Information juga uncountable noun, sehingga bentuk information tanpa -s sudah tepat.
optionAnalysis.B:
to carry
Bagian ini tepat karena pola yang benar adalah advise someone to do something.
optionAnalysis.C:
several maps
Frasa ini benar. Several diikuti countable plural noun, dan maps sudah plural.
optionAnalysis.D:
many useful advices
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Advice adalah uncountable noun, jadi tidak memakai many dan tidak menjadi advices. Bentuk yang benar adalah much useful advice atau a lot of useful advice.

explanation.toeflTrap: Beberapa noun yang terasa bisa dijamakkan dalam bahasa Indonesia tetap uncountable dalam bahasa Inggris: advice, information, evidence, equipment, furniture, dan research.
explanation.quickNote: advice, bukan advices.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W28 — Uncountable Noun

Soal
The travel agency gave the visitors [A] detailed information about the mountain route, advised them [B] to carry extra water during the dry season, and provided [C] several maps that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts, but it did not offer [D] many useful advices about local customs.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
many useful advices

Perbaikan
much useful advice / a lot of useful advice

Kalimat benar
The travel agency gave the visitors detailed information about the mountain route, advised them to carry extra water during the dry season, and provided several maps that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts, but it did not offer much useful advice about local customs.

Alternatif yang juga benar
The travel agency gave the visitors detailed information about the mountain route, advised them to carry extra water during the dry season, and provided several maps that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts, but it did not offer a lot of useful advice about local customs.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji uncountable noun. Advice adalah uncountable noun dalam bahasa Inggris standar, sehingga tidak dibuat plural menjadi advices dan tidak memakai many.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

many useful advices

Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “nasihat-nasihat” atau “saran-saran” terasa wajar. Namun dalam bahasa Inggris standar, advice tidak dihitung sebagai advices dalam konteks umum. Karena advice uncountable, kita tidak memakai many dan tidak menambahkan -s.

Bentuk yang lebih tepat adalah:

much useful advice

atau:

a lot of useful advice

Kalau ingin membuatnya countable, perlu unit seperti:

many useful pieces of advice

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The travel agency = subject.
• gave the visitors detailed information = verb phrase pertama.
• advised them to carry extra water = verb phrase kedua.
• provided several maps = verb phrase ketiga.
• that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts = relative clause.
• but it did not offer much useful advice about local customs = contrast clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. detailed information
Bagian ini benar. Information juga uncountable noun, sehingga bentuk information tanpa -s sudah tepat.

B. to carry
Bagian ini tepat karena pola yang benar adalah advise someone to do something.

C. several maps
Frasa ini benar. Several diikuti countable plural noun, dan maps sudah plural.

D. many useful advices
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Advice adalah uncountable noun, jadi tidak memakai many dan tidak menjadi advices. Bentuk yang benar adalah much useful advice atau a lot of useful advice.

Jebakan TOEFL
Beberapa noun yang terasa bisa dijamakkan dalam bahasa Indonesia tetap uncountable dalam bahasa Inggris: advice, information, evidence, equipment, furniture, dan research.

Catatan cepat
advice, bukan advices.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The travel agency = subject.*
- *gave the visitors detailed information = verb phrase pertama.*
- *advised them to carry extra water = verb phrase kedua.*
- *provided several maps = verb phrase ketiga.*
- *that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts = relative clause.*
- *but it did not offer much useful advice about local customs = contrast clause.*
correction: much useful advice / a lot of useful advice
correctedSentence: The travel agency gave the visitors detailed information about the mountain route, advised them to carry extra water during the dry season, and provided several maps that showed shelters, springs, and emergency posts, but it did not offer much useful advice about local customs.

questionText: The river path became [A] more safer after the city installed lamps near the benches, repaired the broken stones beside the water, and added signs warning cyclists to slow down [B] before sharp turns [C] along the narrowest part of [D] the trail.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji comparative adjective. Untuk adjective pendek seperti safe, bentuk comparative-nya adalah safer, bukan more safer.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini membandingkan kondisi river path sebelum dan sesudah perbaikan. Setelah kota memasang lampu, memperbaiki batu yang rusak, dan menambahkan tanda peringatan, jalan di tepi sungai itu menjadi lebih aman.

Untuk adjective pendek seperti safe, comparative cukup dibuat dengan akhiran -er:

safe → safer

Kata more tidak perlu ditambahkan. Bentuk more safer disebut double comparative dan tidak diterima dalam English standard.
explanation.whyCorrect:
more safer
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Safer sudah berarti “lebih aman,” sehingga more tidak perlu ditambahkan. Bentuk yang benar cukup safer.

optionAnalysis.A:
more safer
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Safer sudah berarti “lebih aman,” sehingga more tidak perlu ditambahkan. Bentuk yang benar cukup safer.
optionAnalysis.B:
before sharp turns
Bagian ini benar sebagai preposition phrase yang menunjukkan posisi sebelum tikungan tajam.
optionAnalysis.C:
along the narrowest part of
Frasa ini juga benar untuk menunjukkan letak di sepanjang bagian tersempit dari trail.
optionAnalysis.D:
the trail
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai object dari preposition of.

explanation.toeflTrap: TOEFL sering menguji double comparative: more easier, more faster, more safer. Untuk adjective pendek, cukup gunakan -er.
explanation.quickNote: safer, bukan more safer.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W29 — Comparative Structure

Soal
The river path became [A] more safer after the city installed lamps near the benches, repaired the broken stones beside the water, and added signs warning cyclists to slow down [B] before sharp turns [C] along the narrowest part of [D] the trail.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
more safer

Perbaikan
safer

Kalimat benar
The river path became safer after the city installed lamps near the benches, repaired the broken stones beside the water, and added signs warning cyclists to slow down before sharp turns along the narrowest part of the trail.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji comparative adjective. Untuk adjective pendek seperti safe, bentuk comparative-nya adalah safer, bukan more safer.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini membandingkan kondisi river path sebelum dan sesudah perbaikan. Setelah kota memasang lampu, memperbaiki batu yang rusak, dan menambahkan tanda peringatan, jalan di tepi sungai itu menjadi lebih aman.

Untuk adjective pendek seperti safe, comparative cukup dibuat dengan akhiran -er:

safe → safer

Kata more tidak perlu ditambahkan. Bentuk more safer disebut double comparative dan tidak diterima dalam English standard.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The river path = subject.
• became safer = linking verb + comparative adjective.
• after the city installed, repaired, and added... = time/reason clause.
• warning cyclists to slow down = participial modifier yang menjelaskan signs.
• before sharp turns along the narrowest part of the trail = prepositional phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. more safer
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Safer sudah berarti “lebih aman,” sehingga more tidak perlu ditambahkan. Bentuk yang benar cukup safer.

B. before sharp turns
Bagian ini benar sebagai preposition phrase yang menunjukkan posisi sebelum tikungan tajam.

C. along the narrowest part of
Frasa ini juga benar untuk menunjukkan letak di sepanjang bagian tersempit dari trail.

D. the trail
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai object dari preposition of.

Jebakan TOEFL
TOEFL sering menguji double comparative: more easier, more faster, more safer. Untuk adjective pendek, cukup gunakan -er.

Catatan cepat
safer, bukan more safer.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The river path = subject.*
- *became safer = linking verb + comparative adjective.*
- *after the city installed, repaired, and added... = time/reason clause.*
- *warning cyclists to slow down = participial modifier yang menjelaskan signs.*
- *before sharp turns along the narrowest part of the trail = prepositional phrase.*
correctedSentence: The river path became safer after the city installed lamps near the benches, repaired the broken stones beside the water, and added signs warning cyclists to slow down before sharp turns along the narrowest part of the trail.

questionText: Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform [A] were open when the first passengers arrived, although the coffee stall [B] had already begun serving tea and bread to workers [C] waiting for the morning train [D] before dawn.

choices.B: had already begun serving tea and bread

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement dalam pola neither...nor. Dalam pola ini, verb biasanya mengikuti subject yang paling dekat dengannya.
explanation.reasoning:
Subject gabungannya adalah:

Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform

Dalam pola neither...nor, kita tidak langsung mengikuti noun pertama. Kita melihat noun yang paling dekat dengan verb. Noun terdekat sebelum were adalah:

the small information booth

Booth berbentuk singular. Karena itu, verb yang tepat adalah was, bukan were.

Walaupun bagian pertama ticket machines plural, agreement mengikuti subject terdekat setelah nor.
explanation.whyCorrect:
were open
Kesalahannya ada pada were. Dalam pola neither...nor, verb mengikuti subject terdekat. Karena subject terdekatnya booth yang singular, bentuk yang benar adalah was open.

optionAnalysis.A:
were open
Kesalahannya ada pada were. Dalam pola neither...nor, verb mengikuti subject terdekat. Karena subject terdekatnya booth yang singular, bentuk yang benar adalah was open.
optionAnalysis.B:
had already begun serving tea and bread
Bagian ini benar. Past perfect cocok untuk menunjukkan bahwa coffee stall sudah mulai melayani sebelum penumpang pertama tiba.
optionAnalysis.C:
waiting for the morning train
Bagian ini juga tepat sebagai reduced active relative clause dari workers who were waiting for the morning train.
optionAnalysis.D:
before dawn
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

explanation.toeflTrap: Neither...nor tidak selalu mengikuti subject pertama. Lihat noun paling dekat sebelum verb.
explanation.quickNote: Neither plural nor singular was... jika subject terdekatnya singular.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W30 — Agreement after Neither...Nor

Soal
Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform [A] were open when the first passengers arrived, although the coffee stall [B] had already begun serving tea and bread to workers [C] waiting for the morning train [D] before dawn.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
were

Perbaikan
was

Kalimat benar
Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform was open when the first passengers arrived, although the coffee stall had already begun serving tea and bread to workers waiting for the morning train before dawn.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement dalam pola neither...nor. Dalam pola ini, verb biasanya mengikuti subject yang paling dekat dengannya.

Cara membaca kalimat
Subject gabungannya adalah:

Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform

Dalam pola neither...nor, kita tidak langsung mengikuti noun pertama. Kita melihat noun yang paling dekat dengan verb. Noun terdekat sebelum were adalah:

the small information booth

Booth berbentuk singular. Karena itu, verb yang tepat adalah was, bukan were.

Walaupun bagian pertama ticket machines plural, agreement mengikuti subject terdekat setelah nor.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Neither the old ticket machines... nor the small information booth... = subject gabungan.
• the small information booth = subject terdekat.
• was open = verb phrase + complement.
• when the first passengers arrived = time clause.
• although the coffee stall had already begun serving... = contrast clause.
• workers waiting for the morning train before dawn = noun + participial modifier.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. were open
Kesalahannya ada pada were. Dalam pola neither...nor, verb mengikuti subject terdekat. Karena subject terdekatnya booth yang singular, bentuk yang benar adalah was open.

B. had already begun serving tea and bread
Bagian ini benar. Past perfect cocok untuk menunjukkan bahwa coffee stall sudah mulai melayani sebelum penumpang pertama tiba.

C. waiting for the morning train
Bagian ini juga tepat sebagai reduced active relative clause dari workers who were waiting for the morning train.

D. before dawn
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

Jebakan TOEFL
Neither...nor tidak selalu mengikuti subject pertama. Lihat noun paling dekat sebelum verb.

Catatan cepat
Neither plural nor singular was... jika subject terdekatnya singular.

TOEFL ITP SW Part 2 — Revisi Premium
Written Expression — Pembahasan W16–W30

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Neither the old ticket machines... nor the small information booth... = subject gabungan.*
- *the small information booth = subject terdekat.*
- *was open = verb phrase + complement.*
- *when the first passengers arrived = time clause.*
- *although the coffee stall had already begun serving... = contrast clause.*
- *workers waiting for the morning train before dawn = noun + participial modifier.*
correctedSentence: Neither the old ticket machines near the station entrance nor the small information booth beside the platform was open when the first passengers arrived, although the coffee stall had already begun serving tea and bread to workers waiting for the morning train before dawn.

questionText: The young archer [A] aimed careful at the small target near the edge of the field, released the arrow only after the wind slowed, and smiled when it landed [B] almost exactly in the center [C] of the painted circle [D] on the wooden board.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji adjective vs adverb. Jika sebuah kata menjelaskan verb, bentuknya harus adverb.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini memiliki tiga aksi utama yang dilakukan oleh subject The young archer:

aimed
released
smiled

Bagian yang diuji adalah:

aimed careful

Kata careful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini tepat jika menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a careful archer
a careful movement

Namun dalam kalimat soal, kata tersebut menjelaskan bagaimana archer melakukan aksi aimed. Karena yang dijelaskan adalah verb, bentuk yang dibutuhkan adalah adverb:

aimed carefully

Jadi masalahnya bukan pada makna “hati-hati,” tetapi pada bentuk katanya. Dalam bahasa Inggris, adjective dan adverb harus dibedakan sesuai fungsi.
explanation.whyCorrect:
aimed careful
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Careful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb aimed. Bentuk yang benar adalah aimed carefully.

optionAnalysis.A:
aimed careful
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Careful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb aimed. Bentuk yang benar adalah aimed carefully.
optionAnalysis.B:
almost exactly
Bagian ini sudah tepat. Almost menjelaskan exactly, dan exactly menjelaskan seberapa tepat anak panah itu mendarat di pusat lingkaran.
optionAnalysis.C:
of the painted circle
Frasa ini benar karena menjelaskan center, yaitu pusat dari lingkaran yang dicat.
optionAnalysis.D:
on the wooden board
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah. Frasa ini menjadi keterangan tempat yang menjelaskan posisi lingkaran atau papan sasaran.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “hati-hati” bisa terasa sama saja. Dalam bahasa Inggris, bentuknya berubah: careful untuk noun, carefully untuk verb.
explanation.quickNote: a careful archer, tetapi aimed carefully.

Soal
The young archer [A] aimed careful at the small target near the edge of the field, released the arrow only after the wind slowed, and smiled when it landed [B] almost exactly in the center [C] of the painted circle [D] on the wooden board.

Bagian salah
aimed careful

Perbaikan

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini memiliki tiga aksi utama yang dilakukan oleh subject The young archer:

aimed
released
smiled

Bagian yang diuji adalah:

Kata careful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini tepat jika menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a careful archer

Namun dalam kalimat soal, kata tersebut menjelaskan bagaimana archer melakukan aksi aimed. Karena yang dijelaskan adalah verb, bentuk yang dibutuhkan adalah adverb:

aimed carefully

Jadi masalahnya bukan pada makna “hati-hati,” tetapi pada bentuk katanya. Dalam bahasa Inggris, adjective dan adverb harus dibedakan sesuai fungsi.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The young archer = subject.
• aimed carefully at the small target near the edge of the field = verb phrase pertama.
• released the arrow only after the wind slowed = verb phrase kedua.
• and smiled when it landed almost exactly in the center... = verb phrase ketiga.
• on the wooden board = prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi target.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. aimed careful
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Careful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb aimed. Bentuk yang benar adalah aimed carefully.

B. almost exactly
Bagian ini sudah tepat. Almost menjelaskan exactly, dan exactly menjelaskan seberapa tepat anak panah itu mendarat di pusat lingkaran.

C. of the painted circle
Frasa ini benar karena menjelaskan center, yaitu pusat dari lingkaran yang dicat.

D. on the wooden board
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah. Frasa ini menjadi keterangan tempat yang menjelaskan posisi lingkaran atau papan sasaran.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “hati-hati” bisa terasa sama saja. Dalam bahasa Inggris, bentuknya berubah: careful untuk noun, carefully untuk verb.

Catatan cepat
a careful archer, tetapi aimed carefully.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The young archer = subject.*
- aimed carefully at the small target near the edge of the field = verb phrase pertama.
- *released the arrow only after the wind slowed = verb phrase kedua.*
- *and smiled when it landed almost exactly in the center... = verb phrase ketiga.*
- *on the wooden board = prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi target.*

questionText: During the village festival, several children followed [A] the parade through the main street, stopped near [B] an old fountain to watch the dancers, and later shared food with [C] their neighbors under [D] large colorful tent.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji article sebelum singular countable noun. Noun tunggal yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang perlu diperhatikan adalah:

under large colorful tent

Noun utama dalam frasa itu adalah tent. Kata large dan colorful hanya adjective yang menjelaskan tent. Karena tent adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Kalimat ini tidak sedang membicarakan tenda tertentu yang sudah disebut sebelumnya. Maknanya hanya “di bawah sebuah tenda besar berwarna-warni.” Karena itu, article yang tepat adalah a:

under a large colorful tent
explanation.whyCorrect:
large colorful tent
Kesalahan ada pada hilangnya article. Tent adalah singular countable noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah a large colorful tent.

optionAnalysis.A:
the parade
Bagian ini benar. Parade sudah memakai article the karena mengacu pada parade tertentu dalam festival desa tersebut.
optionAnalysis.B:
an old fountain
Frasa ini tepat. Fountain adalah singular countable noun, dan an digunakan karena old diawali bunyi vokal.
optionAnalysis.C:
their neighbors
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah. Their berfungsi sebagai possessive determiner, dan neighbors berbentuk plural.
optionAnalysis.D:
large colorful tent
Kesalahan ada pada hilangnya article. Tent adalah singular countable noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah a large colorful tent.

explanation.toeflTrap: Adjective seperti large dan colorful sering membuat noun phrase terlihat lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner; noun tent tetap membutuhkan article.
explanation.quickNote: a large tent, bukan large tent.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W32 — Article with Singular Countable Noun

Soal
During the village festival, several children followed [A] the parade through the main street, stopped near [B] an old fountain to watch the dancers, and later shared food with [C] their neighbors under [D] large colorful tent.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
large colorful tent

Perbaikan
a large colorful tent

Kalimat benar
During the village festival, several children followed the parade through the main street, stopped near an old fountain to watch the dancers, and later shared food with their neighbors under a large colorful tent.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji article sebelum singular countable noun. Noun tunggal yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang perlu diperhatikan adalah:

under large colorful tent

Noun utama dalam frasa itu adalah tent. Kata large dan colorful hanya adjective yang menjelaskan tent. Karena tent adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Kalimat ini tidak sedang membicarakan tenda tertentu yang sudah disebut sebelumnya. Maknanya hanya “di bawah sebuah tenda besar berwarna-warni.” Karena itu, article yang tepat adalah a:

under a large colorful tent

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• During the village festival = keterangan waktu.
• several children = subject.
• followed the parade through the main street = verb phrase pertama.
• stopped near an old fountain to watch the dancers = verb phrase kedua.
• and later shared food with their neighbors under a large colorful tent = verb phrase ketiga.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. the parade
Bagian ini benar. Parade sudah memakai article the karena mengacu pada parade tertentu dalam festival desa tersebut.

B. an old fountain
Frasa ini tepat. Fountain adalah singular countable noun, dan an digunakan karena old diawali bunyi vokal.

C. their neighbors
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah. Their berfungsi sebagai possessive determiner, dan neighbors berbentuk plural.

D. large colorful tent
Kesalahan ada pada hilangnya article. Tent adalah singular countable noun, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah a large colorful tent.

Jebakan TOEFL
Adjective seperti large dan colorful sering membuat noun phrase terlihat lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner; noun tent tetap membutuhkan article.

Catatan cepat
a large tent, bukan large tent.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *During the village festival = keterangan waktu.*
- *several children = subject.*
- *followed the parade through the main street = verb phrase pertama.*
- *stopped near an old fountain to watch the dancers = verb phrase kedua.*
- and later shared food with their neighbors under a large colorful tent = verb phrase ketiga.
correctedSentence: During the village festival, several children followed the parade through the main street, stopped near an old fountain to watch the dancers, and later shared food with their neighbors under a large colorful tent.

questionText: Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase [A] looked new after the renovation, although the walls [B] had been painted recently and the ceiling [C] were repaired before the family moved back [D] into the old house.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement. Verb harus mengikuti subject yang benar dalam klausa masing-masing.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian awal kalimat memakai pola neither...nor:

Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase looked new after the renovation

Bagian ini tidak bermasalah karena looked adalah past tense biasa, dan bentuknya tidak berubah antara singular atau plural.

Masalah muncul pada klausa setelah although:

the walls had been painted recently and the ceiling were repaired

Di sini ada dua subject yang berbeda:

the walls
the ceiling

The walls berbentuk plural, sehingga had been painted tidak bermasalah. Namun subject kedua adalah the ceiling, dan ceiling berbentuk singular. Karena ceiling menerima aksi repair, bentuk pasifnya memang tepat, tetapi auxiliary-nya harus singular:

the ceiling was repaired

Bukan:

the ceiling were repaired
explanation.whyCorrect:
were repaired
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Subject dari verb ini adalah the ceiling, singular. Maka auxiliary yang tepat adalah was, sehingga bentuk lengkapnya menjadi was repaired.

optionAnalysis.A:
looked new
Bagian ini benar. Looked adalah past tense dan tidak berubah berdasarkan singular atau plural subject.
optionAnalysis.B:
had been painted recently
Bentuk ini tepat karena walls menerima aksi pengecatan. Had been painted juga sesuai untuk menunjukkan tindakan yang sudah terjadi sebelumnya.
optionAnalysis.C:
were repaired
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Subject dari verb ini adalah the ceiling, singular. Maka auxiliary yang tepat adalah was, sehingga bentuk lengkapnya menjadi was repaired.
optionAnalysis.D:
into the old house
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan arah, yaitu keluarga itu pindah kembali ke dalam rumah lama.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam kalimat panjang, subject bisa berganti di tengah kalimat. Jangan membawa agreement dari walls ke ceiling. Setiap klausa harus dibaca dengan subject-nya sendiri.
explanation.quickNote: the ceiling was repaired, bukan the ceiling were repaired.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W33 — Subject–Verb Agreement with Singular Subject

Soal
Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase [A] looked new after the renovation, although the walls [B] had been painted recently and the ceiling [C] were repaired before the family moved back [D] into the old house.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
were repaired

Perbaikan
was repaired

Kalimat benar
Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase looked new after the renovation, although the walls had been painted recently and the ceiling was repaired before the family moved back into the old house.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement. Verb harus mengikuti subject yang benar dalam klausa masing-masing.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian awal kalimat memakai pola neither...nor:

Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase looked new after the renovation

Bagian ini tidak bermasalah karena looked adalah past tense biasa, dan bentuknya tidak berubah antara singular atau plural.

Masalah muncul pada klausa setelah although:

the walls had been painted recently and the ceiling were repaired

Di sini ada dua subject yang berbeda:

the walls
the ceiling

The walls berbentuk plural, sehingga had been painted tidak bermasalah. Namun subject kedua adalah the ceiling, dan ceiling berbentuk singular. Karena ceiling menerima aksi repair, bentuk pasifnya memang tepat, tetapi auxiliary-nya harus singular:

the ceiling was repaired

Bukan:

the ceiling were repaired

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Neither the wide windows... nor the narrow door... = subject gabungan.
• looked new = verb phrase utama.
• although the walls had been painted recently = contrast clause pertama.
• and the ceiling was repaired = contrast clause kedua.
• before the family moved back into the old house = time clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. looked new
Bagian ini benar. Looked adalah past tense dan tidak berubah berdasarkan singular atau plural subject.

B. had been painted recently
Bentuk ini tepat karena walls menerima aksi pengecatan. Had been painted juga sesuai untuk menunjukkan tindakan yang sudah terjadi sebelumnya.

C. were repaired
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Subject dari verb ini adalah the ceiling, singular. Maka auxiliary yang tepat adalah was, sehingga bentuk lengkapnya menjadi was repaired.

D. into the old house
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan arah, yaitu keluarga itu pindah kembali ke dalam rumah lama.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam kalimat panjang, subject bisa berganti di tengah kalimat. Jangan membawa agreement dari walls ke ceiling. Setiap klausa harus dibaca dengan subject-nya sendiri.

Catatan cepat
the ceiling was repaired, bukan the ceiling were repaired.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Neither the wide windows... nor the narrow door... = subject gabungan.*
- *looked new = verb phrase utama.*
- *although the walls had been painted recently = contrast clause pertama.*
- *and the ceiling was repaired = contrast clause kedua.*
- *before the family moved back into the old house = time clause.*
correctedSentence: Neither the wide windows facing the garden nor the narrow door beside the staircase looked new after the renovation, although the walls had been painted recently and the ceiling was repaired before the family moved back into the old house.

questionText: The hiking club asks new members [A] to bring enough water for the trail, [B] to wear shoes with strong soles, and [C] to check the weather report before leaving, especially because several parts of the route become [D] dangerously after heavy rain.

choices.A: to bring enough water for the trail
choices.B: to wear shoes with strong soles
choices.C: to check the weather report before leaving

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji adjective vs adverb setelah linking verb. Setelah become, bentuk yang dibutuhkan biasanya adjective complement.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian awal kalimat berisi tiga hal yang diminta kepada anggota baru:

to bring enough water
to wear shoes with strong soles
to check the weather report

Ketiganya sudah sejajar sebagai infinitive phrases. Masalah ada pada bagian akhir:

several parts of the route become dangerously

Verb become di sini bukan action verb biasa. Become adalah linking verb, yaitu verb yang menghubungkan subject dengan keadaan atau sifatnya.

Subject pada klausa itu adalah:

several parts of the route

Kalimat ingin menjelaskan bahwa beberapa bagian jalur menjadi berbahaya setelah hujan deras. Karena yang dijelaskan adalah kondisi subject, bentuk yang dibutuhkan adalah adjective:

become dangerous

Bukan adverb:

become dangerously
explanation.whyCorrect:
dangerously after heavy rain
Kesalahan ada pada dangerously. Setelah linking verb become, kalimat membutuhkan adjective dangerous untuk menjelaskan subject several parts of the route.

optionAnalysis.A:
to bring enough water for the trail
Bagian ini tepat karena mengikuti pola ask someone to do something. To bring menjadi tindakan pertama yang diminta.
optionAnalysis.B:
to wear shoes with strong soles
Bagian ini juga benar dan sejajar dengan to bring. Keduanya sama-sama infinitive phrase.
optionAnalysis.C:
to check the weather report before leaving
Bentuk ini tepat karena masih mengikuti deret parallel: to bring, to wear, and to check.
optionAnalysis.D:
dangerously after heavy rain
Kesalahan ada pada dangerously. Setelah linking verb become, kalimat membutuhkan adjective dangerous untuk menjelaskan subject several parts of the route.

explanation.toeflTrap: Akhiran -ly sering terlihat “lebih Inggris,” tetapi tidak selalu benar. Setelah linking verb seperti become, seem, look, sound, feel, dan appear, yang sering dibutuhkan adalah adjective.
explanation.quickNote: The route becomes dangerous, bukan becomes dangerously.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W34 — Complement after Linking Verb

Soal
The hiking club asks new members [A] to bring enough water for the trail, [B] to wear shoes with strong soles, and [C] to check the weather report before leaving, especially because several parts of the route become [D] dangerously after heavy rain.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
dangerously after heavy rain

Perbaikan
dangerous after heavy rain

Kalimat benar
The hiking club asks new members to bring enough water for the trail, to wear shoes with strong soles, and to check the weather report before leaving, especially because several parts of the route become dangerous after heavy rain.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji adjective vs adverb setelah linking verb. Setelah become, bentuk yang dibutuhkan biasanya adjective complement.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian awal kalimat berisi tiga hal yang diminta kepada anggota baru:

to bring enough water
to wear shoes with strong soles
to check the weather report

Ketiganya sudah sejajar sebagai infinitive phrases. Masalah ada pada bagian akhir:

several parts of the route become dangerously

Verb become di sini bukan action verb biasa. Become adalah linking verb, yaitu verb yang menghubungkan subject dengan keadaan atau sifatnya.

Subject pada klausa itu adalah:

several parts of the route

Kalimat ingin menjelaskan bahwa beberapa bagian jalur menjadi berbahaya setelah hujan deras. Karena yang dijelaskan adalah kondisi subject, bentuk yang dibutuhkan adalah adjective:

become dangerous

Bukan adverb:

become dangerously

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The hiking club = subject utama.
• asks = verb utama.
• new members = object.
• to bring..., to wear..., and to check... = parallel infinitive phrases.
• because several parts of the route become dangerous after heavy rain = adverb clause of reason.
• dangerous = adjective complement setelah linking verb become.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. to bring enough water for the trail
Bagian ini tepat karena mengikuti pola ask someone to do something. To bring menjadi tindakan pertama yang diminta.

B. to wear shoes with strong soles
Bagian ini juga benar dan sejajar dengan to bring. Keduanya sama-sama infinitive phrase.

C. to check the weather report before leaving
Bentuk ini tepat karena masih mengikuti deret parallel: to bring, to wear, and to check.

D. dangerously after heavy rain
Kesalahan ada pada dangerously. Setelah linking verb become, kalimat membutuhkan adjective dangerous untuk menjelaskan subject several parts of the route.

Jebakan TOEFL
Akhiran -ly sering terlihat “lebih Inggris,” tetapi tidak selalu benar. Setelah linking verb seperti become, seem, look, sound, feel, dan appear, yang sering dibutuhkan adalah adjective.

Catatan cepat
The route becomes dangerous, bukan becomes dangerously.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The hiking club = subject utama.*
- *asks = verb utama.*
- *new members = object.*
- *to bring..., to wear..., and to check... = parallel infinitive phrases.*
- because several parts of the route become dangerous after heavy rain = adverb clause of reason.
- *dangerous = adjective complement setelah linking verb become.*
correctedSentence: The hiking club asks new members to bring enough water for the trail, to wear shoes with strong soles, and to check the weather report before leaving, especially because several parts of the route become dangerous after heavy rain.

questionText: The old fishing boats [A] lying on the sand near the harbor belonged to families who had lived there for generations, while the broken nets [B] hanging beside them were slowly repaired by teenagers [C] teaching by their grandparents [D] during the long afternoon.

choices.A: lying on the sand near the harbor

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, modifier yang tepat adalah V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang perlu dibaca hati-hati adalah:

teenagers teaching by their grandparents

Secara makna, para remaja itu bukan “mengajar oleh kakek-nenek mereka.” Mereka diajari oleh kakek-nenek mereka. Frasa by their grandparents memberi petunjuk kuat bahwa maknanya pasif.

Bentuk lengkapnya dapat dibayangkan seperti ini:

teenagers who were taught by their grandparents

Jika relative clause pasif itu direduksi, who were dihilangkan:

teenagers taught by their grandparents

Jadi, bentuk yang benar adalah taught, bukan teaching.
explanation.whyCorrect:
teaching by their grandparents
Bagian ini salah karena teaching memberi makna aktif. Dengan adanya by their grandparents, jelas bahwa teenagers menerima aksi pengajaran. Bentuk yang benar adalah taught.

optionAnalysis.A:
lying on the sand near the harbor
Bagian ini benar. Boats berada atau tergeletak di pasir, sehingga lying sebagai participial modifier aktif tepat.
optionAnalysis.B:
hanging beside them
Frasa ini juga tepat. Nets berada tergantung di samping perahu-perahu itu, jadi hanging menjelaskan posisi nets.
optionAnalysis.C:
teaching by their grandparents
Bagian ini salah karena teaching memberi makna aktif. Dengan adanya by their grandparents, jelas bahwa teenagers menerima aksi pengajaran. Bentuk yang benar adalah taught.
optionAnalysis.D:
during the long afternoon
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

explanation.toeflTrap: Frasa by + agent sering menjadi sinyal pasif. Jika ada by their grandparents, bentuk modifier yang biasanya tepat adalah V3.
explanation.quickNote: teenagers taught by their grandparents, bukan teenagers teaching by.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W35 — Reduced Passive Modifier

Soal
The old fishing boats [A] lying on the sand near the harbor belonged to families who had lived there for generations, while the broken nets [B] hanging beside them were slowly repaired by teenagers [C] teaching by their grandparents [D] during the long afternoon.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
teaching

Perbaikan
taught

Kalimat benar
The old fishing boats lying on the sand near the harbor belonged to families who had lived there for generations, while the broken nets hanging beside them were slowly repaired by teenagers taught by their grandparents during the long afternoon.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, modifier yang tepat adalah V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang perlu dibaca hati-hati adalah:

teenagers teaching by their grandparents

Secara makna, para remaja itu bukan “mengajar oleh kakek-nenek mereka.” Mereka diajari oleh kakek-nenek mereka. Frasa by their grandparents memberi petunjuk kuat bahwa maknanya pasif.

Bentuk lengkapnya dapat dibayangkan seperti ini:

teenagers who were taught by their grandparents

Jika relative clause pasif itu direduksi, who were dihilangkan:

teenagers taught by their grandparents

Jadi, bentuk yang benar adalah taught, bukan teaching.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The old fishing boats lying on the sand near the harbor = subject phrase pertama.
• belonged to families who had lived there for generations = predicate pertama.
• the broken nets hanging beside them = subject phrase kedua.
• were slowly repaired = passive verb utama.
• by teenagers taught by their grandparents = agent phrase + reduced passive modifier.
• during the long afternoon = time phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. lying on the sand near the harbor
Bagian ini benar. Boats berada atau tergeletak di pasir, sehingga lying sebagai participial modifier aktif tepat.

B. hanging beside them
Frasa ini juga tepat. Nets berada tergantung di samping perahu-perahu itu, jadi hanging menjelaskan posisi nets.

C. teaching by their grandparents
Bagian ini salah karena teaching memberi makna aktif. Dengan adanya by their grandparents, jelas bahwa teenagers menerima aksi pengajaran. Bentuk yang benar adalah taught.

D. during the long afternoon
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

Jebakan TOEFL
Frasa by + agent sering menjadi sinyal pasif. Jika ada by their grandparents, bentuk modifier yang biasanya tepat adalah V3.

Catatan cepat
teenagers taught by their grandparents, bukan teenagers teaching by.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- The old fishing boats lying on the sand near the harbor = subject phrase pertama.
- *belonged to families who had lived there for generations = predicate pertama.*
- *the broken nets hanging beside them = subject phrase kedua.*
- *were slowly repaired = passive verb utama.*
- *by teenagers taught by their grandparents = agent phrase + reduced passive modifier.*
- *during the long afternoon = time phrase.*
correctedSentence: The old fishing boats lying on the sand near the harbor belonged to families who had lived there for generations, while the broken nets hanging beside them were slowly repaired by teenagers taught by their grandparents during the long afternoon.

questionText: After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts, the village council recommended [A] that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields until the bridge [B] was inspected and [C] strengthened by engineers, but the headman insisted that a warning sign [D] is placed at the entrance immediately.

choices.A: that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields
choices.D: is placed at the entrance immediately

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive setelah verb seperti recommend dan insist. Jika maknanya pasif, bentuknya adalah be + V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian awal sudah memberi pola penting:

recommended that all vehicles use...

Bentuk use sudah tepat karena setelah recommended that, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Masalahnya muncul pada bagian akhir:

the headman insisted that a warning sign is placed

Kata insisted that juga memicu pola mandative subjunctive. Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

a warning sign

Tanda peringatan itu tidak “menempatkan” dirinya sendiri; tanda itu dipasang oleh seseorang. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam subjunctive passive, bentuk yang tepat adalah:

be placed

Bukan:

is placed

Walaupun subject-nya singular, bentuk be tidak berubah menjadi is dalam pola ini.
explanation.whyCorrect:
is placed at the entrance immediately
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Setelah insisted that, bentuk formal yang dibutuhkan adalah subjunctive passive: be placed.

optionAnalysis.A:
that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields
Bagian ini benar. Setelah recommended that, verb use memakai base form, bukan use(s) atau used.
optionAnalysis.B:
was inspected
Bentuk ini tepat karena bridge singular dan menerima aksi inspeksi. Dalam klausa until, ini passive voice biasa, bukan subjunctive.
optionAnalysis.C:
strengthened by engineers
Bagian ini juga benar karena strengthened sejajar dengan inspected dalam struktur pasif: the bridge was inspected and strengthened.
optionAnalysis.D:
is placed at the entrance immediately
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Setelah insisted that, bentuk formal yang dibutuhkan adalah subjunctive passive: be placed.

explanation.toeflTrap: Subjunctive sering terasa “aneh” karena subject singular tidak memakai is. Namun setelah insist that, recommend that, dan request that, bentuk formalnya tetap base form.
explanation.quickNote: insisted that a sign be placed.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W36 — Mandative Subjunctive

Soal
After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts, the village council recommended [A] that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields until the bridge [B] was inspected and [C] strengthened by engineers, but the headman insisted that a warning sign [D] is placed at the entrance immediately.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
is placed

Perbaikan
be placed

Kalimat benar
After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts, the village council recommended that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields until the bridge was inspected and strengthened by engineers, but the headman insisted that a warning sign be placed at the entrance immediately.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive setelah verb seperti recommend dan insist. Jika maknanya pasif, bentuknya adalah be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian awal sudah memberi pola penting:

recommended that all vehicles use...

Bentuk use sudah tepat karena setelah recommended that, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Masalahnya muncul pada bagian akhir:

the headman insisted that a warning sign is placed

Kata insisted that juga memicu pola mandative subjunctive. Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

a warning sign

Tanda peringatan itu tidak “menempatkan” dirinya sendiri; tanda itu dipasang oleh seseorang. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam subjunctive passive, bentuk yang tepat adalah:

be placed

Bukan:

is placed

Walaupun subject-nya singular, bentuk be tidak berubah menjadi is dalam pola ini.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts = background clause.
• the village council recommended that all vehicles use the temporary road... = main clause pertama.
• until the bridge was inspected and strengthened by engineers = time clause.
• the headman insisted that a warning sign be placed at the entrance immediately = main clause kedua dengan mandative subjunctive.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields
Bagian ini benar. Setelah recommended that, verb use memakai base form, bukan use(s) atau used.

B. was inspected
Bentuk ini tepat karena bridge singular dan menerima aksi inspeksi. Dalam klausa until, ini passive voice biasa, bukan subjunctive.

C. strengthened by engineers
Bagian ini juga benar karena strengthened sejajar dengan inspected dalam struktur pasif: the bridge was inspected and strengthened.

D. is placed at the entrance immediately
Di sinilah kesalahannya. Setelah insisted that, bentuk formal yang dibutuhkan adalah subjunctive passive: be placed.

Jebakan TOEFL
Subjunctive sering terasa “aneh” karena subject singular tidak memakai is. Namun setelah insist that, recommend that, dan request that, bentuk formalnya tetap base form.

Catatan cepat
insisted that a sign be placed.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts = background clause.*
- the village council recommended that all vehicles use the temporary road... = main clause pertama.
- *until the bridge was inspected and strengthened by engineers = time clause.*
- the headman insisted that a warning sign be placed at the entrance immediately = main clause kedua dengan mandative subjunctive.
correctedSentence: After the old bridge became too weak for heavy carts, the village council recommended that all vehicles use the temporary road near the rice fields until the bridge was inspected and strengthened by engineers, but the headman insisted that a warning sign be placed at the entrance immediately.

questionText: Only [A] a few student from the coastal school joined the early morning clean-up, although the principal had announced the activity twice and several teachers [B] had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water [C] for the volunteers who gathered [D] near the beach.

choices.A: a few student from the coastal school
choices.B: had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji plural countable noun setelah a few. Frasa a few harus diikuti noun plural.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

a few student

Student adalah countable noun. Karena sebelumnya ada a few, noun tersebut harus berbentuk plural:

a few students

A few bermakna “beberapa,” sehingga tidak boleh diikuti singular countable noun. Setelah diperbaiki, subject kalimat menjadi:

Only a few students from the coastal school

Subject ini cocok dengan verb joined.
explanation.whyCorrect:
a few student from the coastal school
Kesalahan ada pada student. Karena didahului a few, noun harus plural. Bentuk yang benar adalah a few students.

optionAnalysis.A:
a few student from the coastal school
Kesalahan ada pada student. Karena didahului a few, noun harus plural. Bentuk yang benar adalah a few students.
optionAnalysis.B:
*had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water*
Bagian ini tepat. Several teachers adalah subject plural, dan had prepared sesuai untuk tindakan yang sudah disiapkan sebelumnya.
optionAnalysis.C:
for the volunteers who gathered
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan penerima/manfaat. Who gathered juga tepat karena who merujuk pada volunteers.
optionAnalysis.D:
near the beach
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan tempat.

explanation.toeflTrap: Quantifier seperti a few, several, many, dan a number of biasanya membutuhkan countable plural noun.
explanation.quickNote: a few students, bukan a few student.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W37 — Countable Plural after “A Few”

Soal
Only [A] a few student from the coastal school joined the early morning clean-up, although the principal had announced the activity twice and several teachers [B] had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water [C] for the volunteers who gathered [D] near the beach.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
a few student

Perbaikan
a few students

Kalimat benar
Only a few students from the coastal school joined the early morning clean-up, although the principal had announced the activity twice and several teachers had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water for the volunteers who gathered near the beach.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji plural countable noun setelah a few. Frasa a few harus diikuti noun plural.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

a few student

Student adalah countable noun. Karena sebelumnya ada a few, noun tersebut harus berbentuk plural:

a few students

A few bermakna “beberapa,” sehingga tidak boleh diikuti singular countable noun. Setelah diperbaiki, subject kalimat menjadi:

Only a few students from the coastal school

Subject ini cocok dengan verb joined.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Only a few students from the coastal school = subject.
• joined = verb utama.
• the early morning clean-up = object.
• although the principal had announced the activity twice = contrast clause pertama.
• and several teachers had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water = contrast clause kedua.
• for the volunteers who gathered near the beach = prepositional phrase + relative clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. a few student from the coastal school
Kesalahan ada pada student. Karena didahului a few, noun harus plural. Bentuk yang benar adalah a few students.

B. had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water
Bagian ini tepat. Several teachers adalah subject plural, dan had prepared sesuai untuk tindakan yang sudah disiapkan sebelumnya.

C. for the volunteers who gathered
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan penerima/manfaat. Who gathered juga tepat karena who merujuk pada volunteers.

D. near the beach
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan tempat.

Jebakan TOEFL
Quantifier seperti a few, several, many, dan a number of biasanya membutuhkan countable plural noun.

Catatan cepat
a few students, bukan a few student.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Only a few students from the coastal school = subject.*
- *joined = verb utama.*
- *the early morning clean-up = object.*
- *although the principal had announced the activity twice = contrast clause pertama.*
- *and several teachers had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water = contrast clause kedua.*
- *for the volunteers who gathered near the beach = prepositional phrase + relative clause.*
