correctedSentence: Only a few students from the coastal school joined the early morning clean-up, although the principal had announced the activity twice and several teachers had prepared gloves, baskets, and drinking water for the volunteers who gathered near the beach.

questionText: Many residents objected [A] to closing the small public garden near the river, especially because children often played there after school and elderly people depended [B] on its shade during hot afternoons, but the developer remained interested [C] to build a parking lot [D] beside the market.

choices.A: to closing the small public garden near the river

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji adjective + preposition pattern. Interested biasanya diikuti in + noun/gerund, bukan to + verb.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini memiliki beberapa pola preposition yang harus dibaca satu per satu.

Bagian pertama:

objected to closing

Sudah benar, karena object to memakai to sebagai preposition. Setelah preposition, bentuk verbal menjadi gerund: closing.

Bagian kedua:

depended on its shade

Juga benar, karena depend berpasangan dengan on.

Masalahnya ada pada bagian:

interested to build

Dalam English standard, pola yang tepat adalah:

interested in building

Karena in adalah preposition, bentuk verbal setelahnya harus gerund:

in building a parking lot
explanation.whyCorrect:
to build a parking lot
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Interested tidak memakai pola interested to build dalam konteks ini. Bentuk yang benar adalah interested in building.

optionAnalysis.A:
to closing the small public garden near the river
Bagian ini benar. Dalam pola object to, kata to adalah preposition, sehingga closing sebagai gerund sudah tepat.
optionAnalysis.B:
on its shade
Bagian ini juga benar karena depend membutuhkan preposition on.
optionAnalysis.C:
to build a parking lot
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Interested tidak memakai pola interested to build dalam konteks ini. Bentuk yang benar adalah interested in building.
optionAnalysis.D:
beside the market
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan tempat.

explanation.toeflTrap: Tidak semua “tertarik untuk melakukan” diterjemahkan menjadi interested to do. Dalam bahasa Inggris formal, gunakan interested in doing.
explanation.quickNote: interested in building, bukan interested to build.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W38 — Preposition Pattern

Soal
Many residents objected [A] to closing the small public garden near the river, especially because children often played there after school and elderly people depended [B] on its shade during hot afternoons, but the developer remained interested [C] to build a parking lot [D] beside the market.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
interested to build

Perbaikan
interested in building

Kalimat benar
Many residents objected to closing the small public garden near the river, especially because children often played there after school and elderly people depended on its shade during hot afternoons, but the developer remained interested in building a parking lot beside the market.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji adjective + preposition pattern. Interested biasanya diikuti in + noun/gerund, bukan to + verb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini memiliki beberapa pola preposition yang harus dibaca satu per satu.

Bagian pertama:

objected to closing

Sudah benar, karena object to memakai to sebagai preposition. Setelah preposition, bentuk verbal menjadi gerund: closing.

Bagian kedua:

depended on its shade

Juga benar, karena depend berpasangan dengan on.

Masalahnya ada pada bagian:

interested to build

Dalam English standard, pola yang tepat adalah:

interested in building

Karena in adalah preposition, bentuk verbal setelahnya harus gerund:

in building a parking lot

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Many residents = subject.
• objected to closing the small public garden = verb phrase pertama.
• because children often played there... and elderly people depended on its shade... = reason clauses.
• the developer remained interested in building a parking lot beside the market = contrast clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. to closing the small public garden near the river
Bagian ini benar. Dalam pola object to, kata to adalah preposition, sehingga closing sebagai gerund sudah tepat.

B. on its shade
Bagian ini juga benar karena depend membutuhkan preposition on.

C. to build a parking lot
Kesalahannya ada di sini. Interested tidak memakai pola interested to build dalam konteks ini. Bentuk yang benar adalah interested in building.

D. beside the market
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan tempat.

Jebakan TOEFL
Tidak semua “tertarik untuk melakukan” diterjemahkan menjadi interested to do. Dalam bahasa Inggris formal, gunakan interested in doing.

Catatan cepat
interested in building, bukan interested to build.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Many residents = subject.*
- *objected to closing the small public garden = verb phrase pertama.*
- because children often played there... and elderly people depended on its shade... = reason clauses.
- the developer remained interested in building a parking lot beside the market = contrast clause.
correctedSentence: Many residents objected to closing the small public garden near the river, especially because children often played there after school and elderly people depended on its shade during hot afternoons, but the developer remained interested in building a parking lot beside the market.

questionText: The tourists asked the guide [A] where the trail entered the forest, how long the walk would take, and [B] why did the village close the old wooden gate [C] before sunset during the rainy season [D] each year.

choices.A: where the trail entered the forest
choices.B: why did the village close the old wooden gate
choices.C: before sunset during the rainy season

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji urutan kata dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, urutannya adalah question word + subject + verb.
explanation.reasoning:
Kata asked membutuhkan object. Dalam kalimat ini, object-nya berupa beberapa embedded questions:

where the trail entered the forest
how long the walk would take
why the village closed the old wooden gate

Dua bagian pertama sudah benar. Bagian ketiga salah karena memakai pola pertanyaan langsung:

why did the village close...

Dalam noun clause setelah asked, auxiliary did tidak dipakai. Urutannya harus kembali menjadi pola pernyataan:

why the village closed...

Jadi bentuk yang benar adalah:

why the village closed the old wooden gate
explanation.whyCorrect:
why did the village close the old wooden gate
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Bentuk ini memakai direct question word order. Dalam embedded question, bentuk yang benar adalah why the village closed.

optionAnalysis.A:
where the trail entered the forest
*Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti urutan noun clause: question word + subject + verb.*
optionAnalysis.B:
why did the village close the old wooden gate
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Bentuk ini memakai direct question word order. Dalam embedded question, bentuk yang benar adalah why the village closed.
optionAnalysis.C:
before sunset during the rainy season
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.D:
each year
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai adverbial time expression yang menunjukkan kebiasaan tahunan.

explanation.toeflTrap: Jika satu kalimat berisi beberapa noun clauses, TOEFL bisa membuat dua benar dan satu salah. Jangan berhenti memeriksa setelah bagian pertama terlihat benar.
explanation.quickNote: Why did it close? → asked why it closed.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W39 — Noun Clause Word Order

Soal
The tourists asked the guide [A] where the trail entered the forest, how long the walk would take, and [B] why did the village close the old wooden gate [C] before sunset during the rainy season [D] each year.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
why did the village

Perbaikan
why the village

Kalimat benar
The tourists asked the guide where the trail entered the forest, how long the walk would take, and why the village closed the old wooden gate before sunset during the rainy season each year.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji urutan kata dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, urutannya adalah question word + subject + verb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kata asked membutuhkan object. Dalam kalimat ini, object-nya berupa beberapa embedded questions:

where the trail entered the forest
how long the walk would take
why the village closed the old wooden gate

Dua bagian pertama sudah benar. Bagian ketiga salah karena memakai pola pertanyaan langsung:

why did the village close...

Dalam noun clause setelah asked, auxiliary did tidak dipakai. Urutannya harus kembali menjadi pola pernyataan:

why the village closed...

Jadi bentuk yang benar adalah:

why the village closed the old wooden gate

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The tourists = subject.
• asked = verb.
• the guide = object.
• where the trail entered the forest = noun clause pertama.
• how long the walk would take = noun clause kedua.
• why the village closed the old wooden gate... = noun clause ketiga.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. where the trail entered the forest
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti urutan noun clause: question word + subject + verb.

B. why did the village close the old wooden gate
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Bentuk ini memakai direct question word order. Dalam embedded question, bentuk yang benar adalah why the village closed.

C. before sunset during the rainy season
Frasa ini tepat sebagai keterangan waktu.

D. each year
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai adverbial time expression yang menunjukkan kebiasaan tahunan.

Jebakan TOEFL
Jika satu kalimat berisi beberapa noun clauses, TOEFL bisa membuat dua benar dan satu salah. Jangan berhenti memeriksa setelah bagian pertama terlihat benar.

Catatan cepat
Why did it close? → asked why it closed.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The tourists = subject.*
- *asked = verb.*
- *the guide = object.*
- *where the trail entered the forest = noun clause pertama.*
- *how long the walk would take = noun clause kedua.*
- *why the village closed the old wooden gate... = noun clause ketiga.*
correctedSentence: The tourists asked the guide where the trail entered the forest, how long the walk would take, and why the village closed the old wooden gate before sunset during the rainy season each year.

questionText: Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances, tickets for weekend shows [A] should buy at least two days in advance, and visitors are advised [B] to arrive early if they want seats [C] near the front [D] of the balcony.

choices.A: should buy at least two days in advance

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji passive voice dengan modal. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya adalah modal + be + V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Subject klausa utama adalah:

tickets for weekend shows

Sekarang lihat maknanya. Tiket tidak membeli sesuatu. Tiket justru dibeli oleh pengunjung. Karena subject menerima aksi, bentuk aktif should buy tidak cocok.

Dengan modal should, passive voice dibentuk dengan:

should be bought

Kalimat lengkapnya menjadi:

tickets for weekend shows should be bought at least two days in advance
explanation.whyCorrect:
should buy at least two days in advance
Bagian ini salah karena subject-nya adalah tickets, benda yang menerima aksi pembelian. Bentuk yang benar adalah should be bought.

optionAnalysis.A:
should buy at least two days in advance
Bagian ini salah karena subject-nya adalah tickets, benda yang menerima aksi pembelian. Bentuk yang benar adalah should be bought.
optionAnalysis.B:
to arrive early
Bagian ini benar. Setelah are advised, infinitive to arrive tepat.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the front
Frasa ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan tempat.
optionAnalysis.D:
of the balcony
Bagian ini juga benar karena menjelaskan front, yaitu bagian depan dari balkon.

explanation.toeflTrap: Setelah modal, passive voice tetap membutuhkan be. Jangan hanya memilih should + V1 jika subject menerima aksi.
explanation.quickNote: tickets should be bought, bukan tickets should buy.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W40 — Passive Voice with Modal

Soal
Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances, tickets for weekend shows [A] should buy at least two days in advance, and visitors are advised [B] to arrive early if they want seats [C] near the front [D] of the balcony.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
should buy

Perbaikan
should be bought

Kalimat benar
Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances, tickets for weekend shows should be bought at least two days in advance, and visitors are advised to arrive early if they want seats near the front of the balcony.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji passive voice dengan modal. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya adalah modal + be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Subject klausa utama adalah:

tickets for weekend shows

Sekarang lihat maknanya. Tiket tidak membeli sesuatu. Tiket justru dibeli oleh pengunjung. Karena subject menerima aksi, bentuk aktif should buy tidak cocok.

Dengan modal should, passive voice dibentuk dengan:

should be bought

Kalimat lengkapnya menjadi:

tickets for weekend shows should be bought at least two days in advance

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances = reason clause.
• tickets for weekend shows = subject.
• should be bought at least two days in advance = modal passive verb phrase.
• visitors are advised to arrive early = passive clause kedua.
• if they want seats near the front of the balcony = conditional clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. should buy at least two days in advance
Bagian ini salah karena subject-nya adalah tickets, benda yang menerima aksi pembelian. Bentuk yang benar adalah should be bought.

B. to arrive early
Bagian ini benar. Setelah are advised, infinitive to arrive tepat.

C. near the front
Frasa ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan tempat.

D. of the balcony
Bagian ini juga benar karena menjelaskan front, yaitu bagian depan dari balkon.

Jebakan TOEFL
Setelah modal, passive voice tetap membutuhkan be. Jangan hanya memilih should + V1 jika subject menerima aksi.

Catatan cepat
tickets should be bought, bukan tickets should buy.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances = reason clause.*
- *tickets for weekend shows = subject.*
- *should be bought at least two days in advance = modal passive verb phrase.*
- *visitors are advised to arrive early = passive clause kedua.*
- *if they want seats near the front of the balcony = conditional clause.*
correctedSentence: Because the old theater often becomes crowded after evening performances, tickets for weekend shows should be bought at least two days in advance, and visitors are advised to arrive early if they want seats near the front of the balcony.

questionText: The path through the mangrove forest became [C] much narrower after the storm, and the wooden signs were harder to see because the leaves had grown [D] more thickly around them, but the return route was [B] more easier for visitors who followed the river [A] back to the pier.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji comparative adjective. Kata easy berubah menjadi easier, bukan more easier.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

more easier

Easier sudah berarti “lebih mudah.” Jika more ditambahkan lagi, bentuknya menjadi double comparative, dan itu tidak diterima dalam English standard.

Dalam kalimat ini, return route dibandingkan dengan rute sebelumnya atau kondisi lain. Jadi bentuk comparative memang dibutuhkan, tetapi cukup:

easier

Bukan:

more easier
explanation.whyCorrect:
more easier
Kesalahan ada pada double comparative. Easier sudah comparative, sehingga more tidak perlu dipakai.

optionAnalysis.A:
back to the pier
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan arah.
optionAnalysis.B:
more easier
Kesalahan ada pada double comparative. Easier sudah comparative, sehingga more tidak perlu dipakai.
optionAnalysis.C:
much narrower
Bagian ini benar. Much dapat digunakan untuk memperkuat comparative adjective, misalnya much narrower, much better, atau much colder.
optionAnalysis.D:
more thickly
Bentuk ini tepat karena thickly adalah adverb, dan comparative adverb dapat memakai more.

explanation.toeflTrap: Jangan menganggap semua perbandingan harus memakai more. Untuk adjective seperti easy, bentuk comparative-nya adalah easier.
explanation.quickNote: easier, bukan more easier.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W41 — Comparative Structure

Soal
The path through the mangrove forest became [C] much narrower after the storm, and the wooden signs were harder to see because the leaves had grown [D] more thickly around them, but the return route was [B] more easier for visitors who followed the river [A] back to the pier.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
more easier

Perbaikan
easier

Kalimat benar
The path through the mangrove forest became much narrower after the storm, and the wooden signs were harder to see because the leaves had grown more thickly around them, but the return route was easier for visitors who followed the river back to the pier.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji comparative adjective. Kata easy berubah menjadi easier, bukan more easier.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

more easier

Easier sudah berarti “lebih mudah.” Jika more ditambahkan lagi, bentuknya menjadi double comparative, dan itu tidak diterima dalam English standard.

Dalam kalimat ini, return route dibandingkan dengan rute sebelumnya atau kondisi lain. Jadi bentuk comparative memang dibutuhkan, tetapi cukup:

easier

Bukan:

more easier

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The path through the mangrove forest became much narrower after the storm = clause pertama.
• the wooden signs were harder to see = clause kedua.
• because the leaves had grown more thickly around them = reason clause.
• the return route was easier for visitors... = contrast clause.
• who followed the river back to the pier = relative clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. much narrower
Bagian ini benar. Much dapat digunakan untuk memperkuat comparative adjective, misalnya much narrower, much better, atau much colder.

D. more thickly
Bentuk ini tepat karena thickly adalah adverb, dan comparative adverb dapat memakai more.

B. more easier
Kesalahan ada pada double comparative. Easier sudah comparative, sehingga more tidak perlu dipakai.

A. back to the pier
Frasa ini benar sebagai keterangan arah.

Jebakan TOEFL
Jangan menganggap semua perbandingan harus memakai more. Untuk adjective seperti easy, bentuk comparative-nya adalah easier.

Catatan cepat
easier, bukan more easier.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- The path through the mangrove forest became much narrower after the storm = clause pertama.
- *the wooden signs were harder to see = clause kedua.*
- *because the leaves had grown more thickly around them = reason clause.*
- *the return route was easier for visitors... = contrast clause.*
- *who followed the river back to the pier = relative clause.*
correctedSentence: The path through the mangrove forest became much narrower after the storm, and the wooden signs were harder to see because the leaves had grown more thickly around them, but the return route was easier for visitors who followed the river back to the pier.

questionText: The number of bicycles parked outside the train station [A] have increased since the city opened a new cycling lane, although several commuters still prefer [B] to ride buses when the weather becomes rainy [C] in the late afternoon [D] during the monsoon season.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji agreement pada pola the number of + plural noun. Head subject-nya adalah number, sehingga verb-nya singular.
explanation.reasoning:
Subject phrase-nya adalah:

The number of bicycles parked outside the train station

Kata bicycles memang plural dan dekat dengan verb. Namun bicycles berada dalam frasa of bicycles yang hanya menjelaskan jumlah apa yang dimaksud.

Head subject yang mengontrol verb adalah:

The number

Karena number singular, present perfect yang benar adalah:

has increased

Bukan:

have increased
explanation.whyCorrect:
have increased
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Verb harus mengikuti number, bukan bicycles. Karena number singular, bentuk yang benar adalah has increased.

optionAnalysis.A:
have increased
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Verb harus mengikuti number, bukan bicycles. Karena number singular, bentuk yang benar adalah has increased.
optionAnalysis.B:
to ride buses
Bagian ini benar. Setelah prefer, infinitive to ride dapat digunakan dengan tepat.
optionAnalysis.C:
in the late afternoon
Frasa ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.D:
during the monsoon season
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu yang lebih luas.

explanation.toeflTrap: The number of dan a number of berbeda. The number of memakai singular verb, sedangkan a number of memakai plural verb.
explanation.quickNote: The number of bicycles has increased.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W42 — Subject–Verb Agreement with “The Number of”

Soal
The number of bicycles parked outside the train station [A] have increased since the city opened a new cycling lane, although several commuters still prefer [B] to ride buses when the weather becomes rainy [C] in the late afternoon [D] during the monsoon season.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
have increased

Perbaikan
has increased

Kalimat benar
The number of bicycles parked outside the train station has increased since the city opened a new cycling lane, although several commuters still prefer to ride buses when the weather becomes rainy in the late afternoon during the monsoon season.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji agreement pada pola the number of + plural noun. Head subject-nya adalah number, sehingga verb-nya singular.

Cara membaca kalimat
Subject phrase-nya adalah:

The number of bicycles parked outside the train station

Kata bicycles memang plural dan dekat dengan verb. Namun bicycles berada dalam frasa of bicycles yang hanya menjelaskan jumlah apa yang dimaksud.

Head subject yang mengontrol verb adalah:

The number

Karena number singular, present perfect yang benar adalah:

has increased

Bukan:

have increased

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The number of bicycles parked outside the train station = subject phrase.
• number = head subject singular.
• has increased = present perfect verb phrase singular.
• since the city opened a new cycling lane = time clause.
• although several commuters still prefer to ride buses... = contrast clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. have increased
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Verb harus mengikuti number, bukan bicycles. Karena number singular, bentuk yang benar adalah has increased.

B. to ride buses
Bagian ini benar. Setelah prefer, infinitive to ride dapat digunakan dengan tepat.

C. in the late afternoon
Frasa ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan waktu.

D. during the monsoon season
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu yang lebih luas.

Jebakan TOEFL
The number of dan a number of berbeda. The number of memakai singular verb, sedangkan a number of memakai plural verb.

Catatan cepat
The number of bicycles has increased.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The number of bicycles parked outside the train station = subject phrase.*
- *number = head subject singular.*
- *has increased = present perfect verb phrase singular.*
- *since the city opened a new cycling lane = time clause.*
- *although several commuters still prefer to ride buses... = contrast clause.*
correctedSentence: The number of bicycles parked outside the train station has increased since the city opened a new cycling lane, although several commuters still prefer to ride buses when the weather becomes rainy in the late afternoon during the monsoon season.

questionText: The village doctor warned the children [D] against swimming in the river after heavy rain, reminded them [B] to wash their hands before eating, and spoke to their parents [A] about to keep the well covered during the flood season [C] each year.

choices.A: about to keep the well covered during the flood season
choices.B: to wash their hands before eating
choices.D: against swimming in the river after heavy rain

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji preposition + gerund. Setelah preposition seperti about, bentuk verbal harus menjadi V-ing.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini memiliki tiga aksi yang dilakukan oleh the village doctor:

warned the children
reminded them
spoke to their parents

Dua pola pertama sudah benar:

warned the children against swimming
reminded them to wash

Masalah ada pada bagian ketiga:

spoke to their parents about to keep the well covered

Dalam frasa ini, about adalah preposition. Setelah preposition, jika yang muncul adalah bentuk verbal, bentuknya harus gerund:

about keeping the well covered

Bukan:

about to keep the well covered
explanation.whyCorrect:
about to keep the well covered during the flood season
Kesalahannya ada pada to keep. Setelah preposition about, bentuk verbal yang dibutuhkan adalah keeping.

optionAnalysis.A:
about to keep the well covered during the flood season
Kesalahannya ada pada to keep. Setelah preposition about, bentuk verbal yang dibutuhkan adalah keeping.
optionAnalysis.B:
to wash their hands before eating
Frasa ini juga benar. Polanya adalah remind someone to do something.
optionAnalysis.C:
each year
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.D:
against swimming in the river after heavy rain
Bagian ini benar karena against adalah preposition, sehingga swimming sebagai gerund sudah tepat.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kata to sering membuat pembelajar mengira bentuknya infinitive. Namun setelah preposition seperti about, bentuk yang benar adalah V-ing.
explanation.quickNote: about keeping, bukan about to keep.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W43 — Gerund after Preposition

Soal
The village doctor warned the children [D] against swimming in the river after heavy rain, reminded them [B] to wash their hands before eating, and spoke to their parents [A] about to keep the well covered during the flood season [C] each year.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
about to keep

Perbaikan
about keeping

Kalimat benar
The village doctor warned the children against swimming in the river after heavy rain, reminded them to wash their hands before eating, and spoke to their parents about keeping the well covered during the flood season each year.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji preposition + gerund. Setelah preposition seperti about, bentuk verbal harus menjadi V-ing.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini memiliki tiga aksi yang dilakukan oleh the village doctor:

warned the children
reminded them
spoke to their parents

Dua pola pertama sudah benar:

warned the children against swimming
reminded them to wash

Masalah ada pada bagian ketiga:

spoke to their parents about to keep the well covered

Dalam frasa ini, about adalah preposition. Setelah preposition, jika yang muncul adalah bentuk verbal, bentuknya harus gerund:

about keeping the well covered

Bukan:

about to keep the well covered

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The village doctor = subject.
• warned the children against swimming... = verb phrase pertama.
• reminded them to wash their hands... = verb phrase kedua.
• and spoke to their parents about keeping the well covered... = verb phrase ketiga.
• during the flood season each year = time phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. against swimming in the river after heavy rain
Bagian ini benar karena against adalah preposition, sehingga swimming sebagai gerund sudah tepat.

B. to wash their hands before eating
Frasa ini juga benar. Polanya adalah remind someone to do something.

A. about to keep the well covered during the flood season
Kesalahannya ada pada to keep. Setelah preposition about, bentuk verbal yang dibutuhkan adalah keeping.

C. each year
Bagian ini tidak bermasalah sebagai keterangan waktu.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kata to sering membuat pembelajar mengira bentuknya infinitive. Namun setelah preposition seperti about, bentuk yang benar adalah V-ing.

Catatan cepat
about keeping, bukan about to keep.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The village doctor = subject.*
- *warned the children against swimming... = verb phrase pertama.*
- *reminded them to wash their hands... = verb phrase kedua.*
- *and spoke to their parents about keeping the well covered... = verb phrase ketiga.*
- *during the flood season each year = time phrase.*
correctedSentence: The village doctor warned the children against swimming in the river after heavy rain, reminded them to wash their hands before eating, and spoke to their parents about keeping the well covered during the flood season each year.

questionText: The mountain village is known for [D] its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets, but visitors often remember the [B] beautiful of the sunrise above the rice terraces more clearly than [C] the food they ate or [A] the souvenirs they bought.

choices.D: its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji word form. Setelah the dan sebelum of, kalimat membutuhkan noun, bukan adjective.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

remember the beautiful of the sunrise

Kata beautiful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini tepat jika menjelaskan noun:

a beautiful sunrise
a beautiful village

Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang diingat oleh pengunjung adalah “keindahan” matahari terbit. Jadi bentuk yang dibutuhkan bukan adjective beautiful, melainkan noun:

beauty

Frasa yang benar adalah:

the beauty of the sunrise
explanation.whyCorrect:
beautiful of the sunrise
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Beautiful adalah adjective, sedangkan struktur the ___ of membutuhkan noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah the beauty of the sunrise.

optionAnalysis.A:
the souvenirs they bought
Frasa ini juga tepat dan sejajar dengan the food they ate.
optionAnalysis.B:
beautiful of the sunrise
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Beautiful adalah adjective, sedangkan struktur the ___ of membutuhkan noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah the beauty of the sunrise.
optionAnalysis.C:
the food they ate
Bagian ini benar sebagai unsur pembanding setelah more clearly than.
optionAnalysis.D:
its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets
Bagian ini benar. Its menunjukkan kepemilikan atau keterkaitan dengan mountain village.

explanation.toeflTrap: TOEFL sering menguji kata yang akarnya familiar tetapi kelas katanya salah. Beautiful dan beauty dekat secara makna, tetapi berbeda fungsi.
explanation.quickNote: beautiful sunrise, tetapi the beauty of the sunrise.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W44 — Word Form: Noun vs Adjective

Soal
The mountain village is known for [D] its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets, but visitors often remember the [B] beautiful of the sunrise above the rice terraces more clearly than [C] the food they ate or [A] the souvenirs they bought.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
beautiful

Perbaikan
beauty

Kalimat benar
The mountain village is known for its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets, but visitors often remember the beauty of the sunrise above the rice terraces more clearly than the food they ate or the souvenirs they bought.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji word form. Setelah the dan sebelum of, kalimat membutuhkan noun, bukan adjective.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

remember the beautiful of the sunrise

Kata beautiful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini tepat jika menjelaskan noun:

a beautiful sunrise
a beautiful village

Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang diingat oleh pengunjung adalah “keindahan” matahari terbit. Jadi bentuk yang dibutuhkan bukan adjective beautiful, melainkan noun:

beauty

Frasa yang benar adalah:

the beauty of the sunrise

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The mountain village = subject.
• is known for its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets = passive predicate.
• visitors often remember the beauty of the sunrise... = contrast clause.
• more clearly than the food they ate or the souvenirs they bought = comparative phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets
Bagian ini benar. Its menunjukkan kepemilikan atau keterkaitan dengan mountain village.

B. beautiful of the sunrise
Di sinilah letak kesalahannya. Beautiful adalah adjective, sedangkan struktur the ___ of membutuhkan noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah the beauty of the sunrise.

C. the food they ate
Bagian ini benar sebagai unsur pembanding setelah more clearly than.

A. the souvenirs they bought
Frasa ini juga tepat dan sejajar dengan the food they ate.

Jebakan TOEFL
TOEFL sering menguji kata yang akarnya familiar tetapi kelas katanya salah. Beautiful dan beauty dekat secara makna, tetapi berbeda fungsi.

Catatan cepat
beautiful sunrise, tetapi the beauty of the sunrise.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The mountain village = subject.*
- *is known for its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets = passive predicate.*
- *visitors often remember the beauty of the sunrise... = contrast clause.*
- more clearly than the food they ate or the souvenirs they bought = comparative phrase.
correctedSentence: The mountain village is known for its quiet streets, stone houses, and evening markets, but visitors often remember the beauty of the sunrise above the rice terraces more clearly than the food they ate or the souvenirs they bought.

questionText: If the boatmen [D] had checked the weather report before leaving the island, they [C] will have avoided the rough waves near the reef and reached the mainland [A] before the evening storm [B] covered the coast.

choices.C: will have avoided the rough waves near the reef
choices.D: had checked the weather report before leaving the island

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.
explanation.reasoning:
If-clause pada soal memakai:

*had checked*

Bentuk had + V3 menunjukkan bahwa kalimat sedang membicarakan kondisi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau hanya dibayangkan berbeda.

Dalam conditional type 3, pola lengkapnya adalah:

*If + subject + had + V3, subject + would have + V3*

*Karena if-clause memakai had checked, klausa hasilnya harus memakai:*

*would have avoided*

Bukan:

will have avoided

Will have + V3 adalah future perfect, sedangkan soal ini tidak membicarakan masa depan. Soal ini membicarakan kemungkinan masa lalu yang tidak terjadi: jika para boatmen sudah mengecek laporan cuaca, mereka akan menghindari ombak kasar.
explanation.whyCorrect:
will have avoided the rough waves near the reef
Kesalahan ada pada will have avoided. Bentuk ini future perfect, padahal kalimat membutuhkan hasil hipotetis masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have avoided.

optionAnalysis.A:
before the evening storm
Bagian ini benar sebagai pembuka keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.B:
covered the coast
Bentuk covered sudah tepat sebagai simple past dalam time clause.
optionAnalysis.C:
will have avoided the rough waves near the reef
Kesalahan ada pada will have avoided. Bentuk ini future perfect, padahal kalimat membutuhkan hasil hipotetis masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have avoided.
optionAnalysis.D:
*had checked the weather report before leaving the island*
Bagian ini benar karena conditional type 3 memakai past perfect dalam if-clause.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kalau if-clause memakai had + V3, jangan pasangkan dengan will have. Pasangan yang benar adalah would have + V3.
explanation.quickNote: *If S had V3, S would have V3.*
explanation.sourceNotes:
W45 — Conditional Type 3

Soal
If the boatmen [D] had checked the weather report before leaving the island, they [C] will have avoided the rough waves near the reef and reached the mainland [A] before the evening storm [B] covered the coast.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
will have avoided

Perbaikan
would have avoided

Kalimat benar
If the boatmen had checked the weather report before leaving the island, they would have avoided the rough waves near the reef and reached the mainland before the evening storm covered the coast.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.

Cara membaca kalimat
If-clause pada soal memakai:

had checked

Bentuk had + V3 menunjukkan bahwa kalimat sedang membicarakan kondisi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau hanya dibayangkan berbeda.

Dalam conditional type 3, pola lengkapnya adalah:

If + subject + had + V3, subject + would have + V3

Karena if-clause memakai had checked, klausa hasilnya harus memakai:

would have avoided

Bukan:

will have avoided

Will have + V3 adalah future perfect, sedangkan soal ini tidak membicarakan masa depan. Soal ini membicarakan kemungkinan masa lalu yang tidak terjadi: jika para boatmen sudah mengecek laporan cuaca, mereka akan menghindari ombak kasar.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• If the boatmen had checked the weather report before leaving the island = if-clause past perfect.
• they would have avoided the rough waves near the reef = result clause pertama.
• and reached the mainland = result clause kedua yang berbagi auxiliary would have.
• before the evening storm covered the coast = time clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. had checked the weather report before leaving the island
Bagian ini benar karena conditional type 3 memakai past perfect dalam if-clause.

C. will have avoided the rough waves near the reef
Kesalahan ada pada will have avoided. Bentuk ini future perfect, padahal kalimat membutuhkan hasil hipotetis masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have avoided.

A. before the evening storm
Bagian ini benar sebagai pembuka keterangan waktu.

B. covered the coast
Bentuk covered sudah tepat sebagai simple past dalam time clause.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kalau if-clause memakai had + V3, jangan pasangkan dengan will have. Pasangan yang benar adalah would have + V3.

Catatan cepat
If S had V3, S would have V3.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- If the boatmen had checked the weather report before leaving the island = if-clause past perfect.
- *they would have avoided the rough waves near the reef = result clause pertama.*
- *and reached the mainland = result clause kedua yang berbagi auxiliary would have.*
- *before the evening storm covered the coast = time clause.*
correctedSentence: If the boatmen had checked the weather report before leaving the island, they would have avoided the rough waves near the reef and reached the mainland before the evening storm covered the coast.

questionText: The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing, many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor, [A] tells visitors about coastal trade, [B] includes several pieces from the sultanate period, and [C] are displayed beside painted maps [D] from the early nineteenth century.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement ketika subject utama dipisahkan dari verb oleh modifier panjang.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini sengaja dibuat panjang agar kita tergoda mengikuti noun plural yang paling dekat. Di awal kalimat ada frasa:

The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing

Head subject-nya bukan lamps, tetapi collection. Kata lamps hanya berada dalam prepositional phrase of clay lamps, sehingga tidak mengontrol verb utama.

Sisipan:

many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor

juga hanya memberi informasi tambahan tentang clay lamps. Sisipan ini tidak mengubah subject utama kalimat.

Karena subject utamanya singular, semua verb utama yang sejajar harus mengikuti bentuk singular:

collection tells
collection includes
collection is displayed

Masalahnya, bagian C memakai are displayed. Bentuk are seolah-olah mengikuti lamps atau pieces yang plural, padahal struktur utama tetap dikontrol oleh collection.
explanation.whyCorrect:
are displayed
Bagian ini salah karena are dipakai untuk subject plural. Dalam struktur utama, subject-nya adalah The collection, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah is displayed.

optionAnalysis.A:
tells
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti subject singular collection. Dalam simple present, subject singular memakai verb dengan akhiran -s.
optionAnalysis.B:
includes
Bagian ini juga benar karena masih mengikuti subject yang sama, yaitu collection. Bentuk includes sejajar dengan tells.
optionAnalysis.C:
are displayed
Bagian ini salah karena are dipakai untuk subject plural. Dalam struktur utama, subject-nya adalah The collection, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah is displayed.
optionAnalysis.D:
from the early nineteenth century
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan painted maps. Frasa ini tidak memengaruhi agreement.

explanation.toeflTrap: Noun plural seperti lamps, families, dan pieces sengaja diletakkan dekat dengan verb agar peserta salah mengikuti noun terdekat. Yang harus dicari adalah head subject, bukan noun terakhir sebelum verb.
explanation.quickNote: The collection ... is displayed, bukan The collection ... are displayed.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W1 — Subject–Verb Agreement with Long Modifier

Soal
The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing, many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor, [A] tells visitors about coastal trade, [B] includes several pieces from the sultanate period, and [C] are displayed beside painted maps [D] from the early nineteenth century.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
are displayed

Perbaikan
is displayed

Kalimat benar
The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing, many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor, tells visitors about coastal trade, includes several pieces from the sultanate period, and is displayed beside painted maps from the early nineteenth century.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement ketika subject utama dipisahkan dari verb oleh modifier panjang.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini sengaja dibuat panjang agar kita tergoda mengikuti noun plural yang paling dekat. Di awal kalimat ada frasa:

The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing

Head subject-nya bukan lamps, tetapi collection. Kata lamps hanya berada dalam prepositional phrase of clay lamps, sehingga tidak mengontrol verb utama.

Sisipan:

many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor

juga hanya memberi informasi tambahan tentang clay lamps. Sisipan ini tidak mengubah subject utama kalimat.

Karena subject utamanya singular, semua verb utama yang sejajar harus mengikuti bentuk singular:

collection tells
collection includes
collection is displayed

Masalahnya, bagian C memakai are displayed. Bentuk are seolah-olah mengikuti lamps atau pieces yang plural, padahal struktur utama tetap dikontrol oleh collection.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing = subject utama.
• collection = head subject singular.
• many of which were donated... = nonrestrictive relative clause.
• tells, includes, and is displayed = tiga verb utama yang sejajar.
• beside painted maps... = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. tells
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti subject singular collection. Dalam simple present, subject singular memakai verb dengan akhiran -s.

B. includes
Bagian ini juga benar karena masih mengikuti subject yang sama, yaitu collection. Bentuk includes sejajar dengan tells.

C. are displayed
Bagian ini salah karena are dipakai untuk subject plural. Dalam struktur utama, subject-nya adalah The collection, sehingga bentuk yang benar adalah is displayed.

D. from the early nineteenth century
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan painted maps. Frasa ini tidak memengaruhi agreement.

Jebakan TOEFL
Noun plural seperti lamps, families, dan pieces sengaja diletakkan dekat dengan verb agar peserta salah mengikuti noun terdekat. Yang harus dicari adalah head subject, bukan noun terakhir sebelum verb.

Catatan cepat
The collection ... is displayed, bukan The collection ... are displayed.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing = subject utama.*
- *collection = head subject singular.*
- *many of which were donated... = nonrestrictive relative clause.*
- *tells, includes, and is displayed = tiga verb utama yang sejajar.*
- *beside painted maps... = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: The collection of clay lamps in the museum’s west wing, many of which were donated by families who once lived near the old harbor, tells visitors about coastal trade, includes several pieces from the sultanate period, and is displayed beside painted maps from the early nineteenth century.

questionText: The narrow stone bridge over the ravine, [A] still crossed by farmers on market days and [B] photographed by tourists at sunset, [C] remains one of the few structures in the valley [D] was made entirely of river stone.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, relative clause pasif dapat dipersingkat menjadi V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat utama sebenarnya sudah jelas:

The narrow stone bridge remains one of the few structures in the valley.

Subject utamanya adalah The narrow stone bridge, dan verb utamanya adalah remains. Bagian di antara koma:

still crossed by farmers on market days and photographed by tourists at sunset

hanya menjelaskan bridge. Dua bentuk crossed dan photographed sudah benar karena bridge menerima aksi: bridge dilintasi dan difoto.

Masalah muncul di bagian akhir:
explanation.whyCorrect:
was made entirely
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru tanpa connector. Bentuk yang tepat adalah made entirely, sebagai reduced passive relative clause.

optionAnalysis.A:
still crossed
Bagian ini benar karena bridge menerima aksi “dilintasi.” Bentuk crossed sebagai past participle cocok untuk modifier pasif.
optionAnalysis.B:
photographed
Bagian ini juga benar karena bridge difoto oleh tourists. Bentuk photographed sejajar dengan crossed.
optionAnalysis.C:
remains
Bagian ini benar karena subject utama bridge singular, sehingga verb simple present-nya remains.
optionAnalysis.D:
was made entirely
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru tanpa connector. Bentuk yang tepat adalah made entirely, sebagai reduced passive relative clause.

explanation.toeflTrap: Bentuk was/were + V3 memang terlihat pasif dan sering terasa benar. Namun jika kalimat sudah memiliki verb utama, bentuk pasif finite bisa menjadi salah karena menciptakan dua predikat tanpa connector.
explanation.quickNote: structures made of stone, bukan structures was made of stone.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W2 — Reduced Passive Relative Clause

Soal
The narrow stone bridge over the ravine, [A] still crossed by farmers on market days and [B] photographed by tourists at sunset, [C] remains one of the few structures in the valley [D] was made entirely of river stone.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
was made entirely

Perbaikan
made entirely

Kalimat benar
The narrow stone bridge over the ravine, still crossed by farmers on market days and photographed by tourists at sunset, remains one of the few structures in the valley made entirely of river stone.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, relative clause pasif dapat dipersingkat menjadi V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat utama sebenarnya sudah jelas:

The narrow stone bridge remains one of the few structures in the valley.

Subject utamanya adalah The narrow stone bridge, dan verb utamanya adalah remains. Bagian di antara koma:

still crossed by farmers on market days and photographed by tourists at sunset

hanya menjelaskan bridge. Dua bentuk crossed dan photographed sudah benar karena bridge menerima aksi: bridge dilintasi dan difoto.

Masalah muncul di bagian akhir:

structures in the valley was made entirely of river stone

Di sini, was made menjadi finite verb baru, padahal kalimat utama sudah punya verb remains. Jika ingin menjelaskan structures, bagian tersebut harus menjadi modifier pasif ringkas:

structures in the valley made entirely of river stone

Bentuk lengkapnya bisa dibayangkan seperti:

structures in the valley that were made entirely of river stone

Namun dalam bentuk reduced clause, that were dihilangkan, sehingga cukup:

made entirely of river stone

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The narrow stone bridge over the ravine = subject utama.
• still crossed... and photographed... = modifier pasif untuk bridge.
• remains = verb utama.
• one of the few structures in the valley = complement.
• made entirely of river stone = reduced passive modifier untuk structures.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. still crossed
Bagian ini benar karena bridge menerima aksi “dilintasi.” Bentuk crossed sebagai past participle cocok untuk modifier pasif.

B. photographed
Bagian ini juga benar karena bridge difoto oleh tourists. Bentuk photographed sejajar dengan crossed.

C. remains
Bagian ini benar karena subject utama bridge singular, sehingga verb simple present-nya remains.

D. was made entirely
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru tanpa connector. Bentuk yang tepat adalah made entirely, sebagai reduced passive relative clause.

Jebakan TOEFL
Bentuk was/were + V3 memang terlihat pasif dan sering terasa benar. Namun jika kalimat sudah memiliki verb utama, bentuk pasif finite bisa menjadi salah karena menciptakan dua predikat tanpa connector.

Catatan cepat
structures made of stone, bukan structures was made of stone.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The narrow stone bridge over the ravine = subject utama.*
- *still crossed... and photographed... = modifier pasif untuk bridge.*
- *remains = verb utama.*
- *one of the few structures in the valley = complement.*
- *made entirely of river stone = reduced passive modifier untuk structures.*
correctedSentence: The narrow stone bridge over the ravine, still crossed by farmers on market days and photographed by tourists at sunset, remains one of the few structures in the valley made entirely of river stone.

questionText: During the library orientation, the senior librarian [A] explained to the first-year students [B] where were the oldest maps kept before showing them the quiet reading room [C] near the archive and the catalog system [D] that could be used after registration.

choices.B: where were the oldest maps kept

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji word order dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, susunannya adalah question word + subject + verb.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini bukan pertanyaan langsung. Librarian sedang menjelaskan “di mana peta-peta tertua disimpan.” Bagian itu menjadi object dari verb explained.

Pertanyaan langsungnya adalah:

Where were the oldest maps kept?

Namun setelah explained, bentuk itu harus berubah menjadi noun clause. Dalam noun clause, auxiliary tidak diletakkan sebelum subject. Maka urutan yang benar adalah:

where the oldest maps were kept

Bukan:

where were the oldest maps kept
explanation.whyCorrect:
where were the oldest maps kept
Bagian ini salah karena memakai pola pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah where the oldest maps were kept.

optionAnalysis.A:
explained to
Bagian ini benar. Pola explain something to someone bisa digunakan, dan dalam kalimat ini something-nya berupa noun clause.
optionAnalysis.B:
where were the oldest maps kept
Bagian ini salah karena memakai pola pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah where the oldest maps were kept.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the archive
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi reading room.
optionAnalysis.D:
that could be used
Bagian ini benar sebagai relative clause. That merujuk pada the catalog system.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kata where sering membuat peserta otomatis memakai pola pertanyaan. Padahal setelah verb seperti explain, know, remember, dan understand, bentuknya harus menjadi embedded noun clause.
explanation.quickNote:
Direct question: Where were the maps kept?
Noun clause: where the maps were kept.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W3 — Noun Clause Word Order

Soal
During the library orientation, the senior librarian [A] explained to the first-year students [B] where were the oldest maps kept before showing them the quiet reading room [C] near the archive and the catalog system [D] that could be used after registration.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
where were the oldest maps kept

Perbaikan
where the oldest maps were kept

Kalimat benar
During the library orientation, the senior librarian explained to the first-year students where the oldest maps were kept before showing them the quiet reading room near the archive and the catalog system that could be used after registration.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji word order dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, susunannya adalah question word + subject + verb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini bukan pertanyaan langsung. Librarian sedang menjelaskan “di mana peta-peta tertua disimpan.” Bagian itu menjadi object dari verb explained.

Pertanyaan langsungnya adalah:

Where were the oldest maps kept?

Namun setelah explained, bentuk itu harus berubah menjadi noun clause. Dalam noun clause, auxiliary tidak diletakkan sebelum subject. Maka urutan yang benar adalah:

where the oldest maps were kept

Bukan:

where were the oldest maps kept

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• During the library orientation = introductory phrase.
• the senior librarian = subject utama.
• explained to the first-year students = verb phrase.
• where the oldest maps were kept = noun clause sebagai object dari explained.
• before showing them... = time phrase.
• that could be used after registration = relative clause yang menjelaskan catalog system.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. explained to
Bagian ini benar. Pola explain something to someone bisa digunakan, dan dalam kalimat ini something-nya berupa noun clause.

B. where were the oldest maps kept
Bagian ini salah karena memakai pola pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah where the oldest maps were kept.

C. near the archive
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi reading room.

D. that could be used
Bagian ini benar sebagai relative clause. That merujuk pada the catalog system.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kata where sering membuat peserta otomatis memakai pola pertanyaan. Padahal setelah verb seperti explain, know, remember, dan understand, bentuknya harus menjadi embedded noun clause.

Catatan cepat
Direct question: Where were the maps kept?
Noun clause: where the maps were kept.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *During the library orientation = introductory phrase.*
- *the senior librarian = subject utama.*
- *explained to the first-year students = verb phrase.*
- *where the oldest maps were kept = noun clause sebagai object dari explained.*
- *before showing them... = time phrase.*
- *that could be used after registration = relative clause yang menjelaskan catalog system.*
incorrectPart: where were the oldest maps kept
correction: where the oldest maps were kept
correctedSentence: During the library orientation, the senior librarian explained to the first-year students where the oldest maps were kept before showing them the quiet reading room near the archive and the catalog system that could be used after registration.

questionText: To make the weekend trip more meaningful, the guide encouraged visitors [A] to listen to local stories at the village hall, [B] to ask questions about traditional houses, and [C] observing how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets [D] near the open market.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji parallel structure. Dalam daftar aktivitas, bentuk grammar setiap item harus sejajar.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini memakai pola:

encourage someone to do something

Guide mendorong visitors melakukan tiga hal:

to listen to local stories
to ask questions
to observe how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets

Dua aktivitas pertama sudah memakai infinitive: to listen dan to ask. Karena bagian ketiga masih berada dalam daftar yang sama, bentuknya juga harus infinitive: to observe.

Bentuk observing tidak sejajar. Secara makna masih bisa dipahami, tetapi secara struktur tidak mengikuti pola yang sudah dibangun oleh dua item sebelumnya.
explanation.whyCorrect:
observing
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to listen dan to ask. Bentuk yang benar adalah to observe.

optionAnalysis.A:
to listen
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti pola encourage someone to do something.
optionAnalysis.B:
to ask
Bagian ini juga benar dan sejajar dengan to listen.
optionAnalysis.C:
observing
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to listen dan to ask. Bentuk yang benar adalah to observe.
optionAnalysis.D:
near the open market
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat yang menjelaskan lokasi kegiatan craftsmen.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam daftar panjang, TOEFL sering menyisipkan satu bentuk yang berbeda sendiri. Jangan hanya membaca makna; cocokkan bentuk grammar setiap elemen.
explanation.quickNote: to listen, to ask, and to observe, bukan to listen, to ask, and observing.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W4 — Parallel Structure with Infinitives

Soal
To make the weekend trip more meaningful, the guide encouraged visitors [A] to listen to local stories at the village hall, [B] to ask questions about traditional houses, and [C] observing how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets [D] near the open market.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
observing

Perbaikan
to observe

Kalimat benar
To make the weekend trip more meaningful, the guide encouraged visitors to listen to local stories at the village hall, to ask questions about traditional houses, and to observe how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets near the open market.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji parallel structure. Dalam daftar aktivitas, bentuk grammar setiap item harus sejajar.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini memakai pola:

encourage someone to do something

Guide mendorong visitors melakukan tiga hal:

to listen to local stories
to ask questions
to observe how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets

Dua aktivitas pertama sudah memakai infinitive: to listen dan to ask. Karena bagian ketiga masih berada dalam daftar yang sama, bentuknya juga harus infinitive: to observe.

Bentuk observing tidak sejajar. Secara makna masih bisa dipahami, tetapi secara struktur tidak mengikuti pola yang sudah dibangun oleh dua item sebelumnya.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• To make the weekend trip more meaningful = purpose phrase.
• the guide = subject.
• encouraged visitors = verb + object.
• to listen, to ask, and to observe = tiga infinitive phrase yang sejajar.
• how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets = noun clause setelah observe.
• near the open market = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. to listen
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti pola encourage someone to do something.

B. to ask
Bagian ini juga benar dan sejajar dengan to listen.

C. observing
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to listen dan to ask. Bentuk yang benar adalah to observe.

D. near the open market
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat yang menjelaskan lokasi kegiatan craftsmen.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam daftar panjang, TOEFL sering menyisipkan satu bentuk yang berbeda sendiri. Jangan hanya membaca makna; cocokkan bentuk grammar setiap elemen.

Catatan cepat
to listen, to ask, and to observe, bukan to listen, to ask, and observing.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *To make the weekend trip more meaningful = purpose phrase.*
- *the guide = subject.*
- *encouraged visitors = verb + object.*
- *to listen, to ask, and to observe = tiga infinitive phrase yang sejajar.*
- *how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets = noun clause setelah observe.*
- *near the open market = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: To make the weekend trip more meaningful, the guide encouraged visitors to listen to local stories at the village hall, to ask questions about traditional houses, and to observe how craftsmen shaped bamboo baskets near the open market.

questionText: After the final practice, the football coach praised the players [C] for arriving early, reminded them [D] to stretch before the match, thanked the captain for helping the younger boys, and insisted [A] on to keep the field clean [B] after everyone left.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji pola preposition + gerund. Setelah insist on, bentuk verbal yang tepat adalah V-ing.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

insisted on to keep the field clean

Kata on adalah preposition. Setelah preposition, kalau yang muncul adalah bentuk verbal, bentuk itu harus menjadi gerund atau V-ing.

Jadi pola yang benar adalah:

insist on keeping

Bukan:

insist on to keep

Kalimat ini memang panjang karena ada beberapa verb utama yang sejajar:

praised
reminded
thanked
insisted

Namun kesalahan utamanya tetap ada pada pola setelah insisted on.
explanation.whyCorrect:
on to keep
Bagian ini salah karena setelah preposition on tidak digunakan to + verb. Bentuk yang benar adalah on keeping.

optionAnalysis.A:
on to keep
Bagian ini salah karena setelah preposition on tidak digunakan to + verb. Bentuk yang benar adalah on keeping.
optionAnalysis.B:
after everyone left
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause. Ada subject everyone dan verb left.
optionAnalysis.C:
for arriving
Bagian ini benar karena setelah preposition for, verb memakai bentuk gerund arriving.
optionAnalysis.D:
to stretch
Bagian ini benar karena polanya adalah remind someone to do something.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kata to sering menggoda karena terasa seperti “untuk” dalam bahasa Indonesia. Namun setelah preposition, TOEFL biasanya menuntut V-ing, bukan to V.
explanation.quickNote: insist on keeping, bukan insist on to keep.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W5 — Preposition Pattern: Insist On + Gerund

Soal
After the final practice, the football coach praised the players [C] for arriving early, reminded them [D] to stretch before the match, thanked the captain for helping the younger boys, and insisted [A] on to keep the field clean [B] after everyone left.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
on to keep

Perbaikan
on keeping

Kalimat benar
After the final practice, the football coach praised the players for arriving early, reminded them to stretch before the match, thanked the captain for helping the younger boys, and insisted on keeping the field clean after everyone left.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji pola preposition + gerund. Setelah insist on, bentuk verbal yang tepat adalah V-ing.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

insisted on to keep the field clean

Kata on adalah preposition. Setelah preposition, kalau yang muncul adalah bentuk verbal, bentuk itu harus menjadi gerund atau V-ing.

Jadi pola yang benar adalah:

insist on keeping

Bukan:

insist on to keep

Kalimat ini memang panjang karena ada beberapa verb utama yang sejajar:

praised
reminded
thanked
insisted

Namun kesalahan utamanya tetap ada pada pola setelah insisted on.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• After the final practice = time phrase.
• the football coach = subject.
• praised, reminded, thanked, and insisted = rangkaian verb utama.
• for arriving early = preposition + gerund.
• to stretch = infinitive setelah reminded them.
• on keeping the field clean = preposition + gerund setelah insisted.
• after everyone left = adverb clause of time.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. for arriving
Bagian ini benar karena setelah preposition for, verb memakai bentuk gerund arriving.

D. to stretch
Bagian ini benar karena polanya adalah remind someone to do something.

B. after everyone left
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause. Ada subject everyone dan verb left.

A. on to keep
Bagian ini salah karena setelah preposition on tidak digunakan to + verb. Bentuk yang benar adalah on keeping.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kata to sering menggoda karena terasa seperti “untuk” dalam bahasa Indonesia. Namun setelah preposition, TOEFL biasanya menuntut V-ing, bukan to V.

Catatan cepat
insist on keeping, bukan insist on to keep.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *After the final practice = time phrase.*
- *the football coach = subject.*
- *praised, reminded, thanked, and insisted = rangkaian verb utama.*
- *for arriving early = preposition + gerund.*
- *to stretch = infinitive setelah reminded them.*
- *on keeping the field clean = preposition + gerund setelah insisted.*
- *after everyone left = adverb clause of time.*
correctedSentence: After the final practice, the football coach praised the players for arriving early, reminded them to stretch before the match, thanked the captain for helping the younger boys, and insisted on keeping the field clean after everyone left.

questionText: The kite rose [D] steadily above the beach after the boy loosened the string, drifted toward the line of coconut trees, and moved [B] graceful in the wind while his little sister watched [A] from the sand beside their father’s boat [C] near the pier.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji perbedaan adjective dan adverb. Jika kata menjelaskan verb, bentuknya harus adverb.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

moved graceful in the wind

Kata graceful adalah adjective. Adjective digunakan untuk menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a graceful dancer
a graceful movement

Namun dalam kalimat ini, kata tersebut menjelaskan aksi moved. Pertanyaannya bukan “kite yang seperti apa,” tetapi “kite bergerak bagaimana.” Karena yang dijelaskan adalah verb, bentuk yang tepat adalah adverb:

moved gracefully in the wind

Kalimat ini juga memiliki rangkaian verb yang sejajar:

rose steadily
drifted
moved gracefully

Steadily sudah benar sebagai adverb yang menjelaskan rose. Maka graceful juga perlu diubah menjadi gracefully agar fungsi katanya tepat.
explanation.whyCorrect:
graceful
Bagian ini salah karena graceful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb moved. Bentuk yang benar adalah gracefully.

optionAnalysis.A:
from the sand
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan dari mana adiknya melihat layang-layang.
optionAnalysis.B:
graceful
Bagian ini salah karena graceful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb moved. Bentuk yang benar adalah gracefully.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the pier
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi tambahan.
optionAnalysis.D:
steadily
Bagian ini benar karena steadily adalah adverb yang menjelaskan cara kite rose.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “anggun” bisa terasa fleksibel. Dalam bahasa Inggris, bentuk kata harus mengikuti fungsi grammar-nya. Verb membutuhkan adverb, bukan adjective.
explanation.quickNote: a graceful movement, tetapi moved gracefully.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W6 — Adjective vs Adverb

Soal
The kite rose [D] steadily above the beach after the boy loosened the string, drifted toward the line of coconut trees, and moved [B] graceful in the wind while his little sister watched [A] from the sand beside their father’s boat [C] near the pier.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
graceful

Perbaikan
gracefully

Kalimat benar
The kite rose steadily above the beach after the boy loosened the string, drifted toward the line of coconut trees, and moved gracefully in the wind while his little sister watched from the sand beside their father’s boat near the pier.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji perbedaan adjective dan adverb. Jika kata menjelaskan verb, bentuknya harus adverb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

moved graceful in the wind

Kata graceful adalah adjective. Adjective digunakan untuk menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a graceful dancer
a graceful movement

Namun dalam kalimat ini, kata tersebut menjelaskan aksi moved. Pertanyaannya bukan “kite yang seperti apa,” tetapi “kite bergerak bagaimana.” Karena yang dijelaskan adalah verb, bentuk yang tepat adalah adverb:

moved gracefully in the wind

Kalimat ini juga memiliki rangkaian verb yang sejajar:

rose steadily
drifted
moved gracefully

Steadily sudah benar sebagai adverb yang menjelaskan rose. Maka graceful juga perlu diubah menjadi gracefully agar fungsi katanya tepat.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The kite = subject utama.
• rose steadily, drifted, and moved gracefully = rangkaian verb phrase.
• steadily = adverb yang menjelaskan rose.
• gracefully = adverb yang menjelaskan moved.
• after the boy loosened the string = adverb clause.
• while his little sister watched... = adverb clause tambahan.
• near the pier = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. steadily
Bagian ini benar karena steadily adalah adverb yang menjelaskan cara kite rose.

A. from the sand
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan dari mana adiknya melihat layang-layang.

B. graceful
Bagian ini salah karena graceful adalah adjective, padahal posisinya menjelaskan verb moved. Bentuk yang benar adalah gracefully.

C. near the pier
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi tambahan.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “anggun” bisa terasa fleksibel. Dalam bahasa Inggris, bentuk kata harus mengikuti fungsi grammar-nya. Verb membutuhkan adverb, bukan adjective.

Catatan cepat
a graceful movement, tetapi moved gracefully.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The kite = subject utama.*
- *rose steadily, drifted, and moved gracefully = rangkaian verb phrase.*
- *steadily = adverb yang menjelaskan rose.*
- *gracefully = adverb yang menjelaskan moved.*
- *after the boy loosened the string = adverb clause.*
- *while his little sister watched... = adverb clause tambahan.*
- *near the pier = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: The kite rose steadily above the beach after the boy loosened the string, drifted toward the line of coconut trees, and moved gracefully in the wind while his little sister watched from the sand beside their father’s boat near the pier.

questionText: The morning train to the coastal town was [A] less crowded than the afternoon bus, but it was [B] more faster than the small ferry and arrived at the station [C] before most shops along the harbor road [D] had opened.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji comparative form. Untuk kata pendek seperti fast, bentuk comparative-nya adalah faster, bukan more faster.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini membandingkan beberapa moda transportasi:

the morning train
the afternoon bus
the small ferry

Bagian A sudah benar:

less crowded than the afternoon bus

Namun bagian B bermasalah:

more faster than the small ferry

Kata fast adalah adjective/adverb pendek. Comparative-nya cukup memakai akhiran -er:

fast → faster

Kita tidak boleh menambahkan more pada kata yang sudah berbentuk comparative dengan -er. Bentuk more faster disebut double comparative.
explanation.whyCorrect:
more faster
Bagian ini salah karena mencampur more dan -er. Bentuk yang benar cukup faster.

optionAnalysis.A:
less crowded
Bagian ini benar. Crowded natural memakai less/more dalam perbandingan.
optionAnalysis.B:
more faster
Bagian ini salah karena mencampur more dan -er. Bentuk yang benar cukup faster.
optionAnalysis.C:
before most shops
Bagian ini benar sebagai awal time clause.
optionAnalysis.D:
*had opened*
Bagian ini benar karena menunjukkan kejadian yang sudah selesai sebelum kereta tiba.

explanation.toeflTrap: More faster terdengar seperti “lebih cepat,” tetapi grammar-nya salah. Gunakan salah satu: more + adjective panjang atau adjective pendek + -er.
explanation.quickNote: faster than, bukan more faster than.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W7 — Comparative Structure

Soal
The morning train to the coastal town was [A] less crowded than the afternoon bus, but it was [B] more faster than the small ferry and arrived at the station [C] before most shops along the harbor road [D] had opened.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
more faster

Perbaikan
faster

Kalimat benar
The morning train to the coastal town was less crowded than the afternoon bus, but it was faster than the small ferry and arrived at the station before most shops along the harbor road had opened.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji comparative form. Untuk kata pendek seperti fast, bentuk comparative-nya adalah faster, bukan more faster.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini membandingkan beberapa moda transportasi:

the morning train
the afternoon bus
the small ferry

Bagian A sudah benar:

less crowded than the afternoon bus

Namun bagian B bermasalah:

more faster than the small ferry

Kata fast adalah adjective/adverb pendek. Comparative-nya cukup memakai akhiran -er:

fast → faster

Kita tidak boleh menambahkan more pada kata yang sudah berbentuk comparative dengan -er. Bentuk more faster disebut double comparative.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The morning train to the coastal town = subject.
• was less crowded than the afternoon bus = comparison pertama.
• was faster than the small ferry = comparison kedua.
• arrived at the station = verb phrase tambahan.
• before most shops... had opened = time clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. less crowded
Bagian ini benar. Crowded natural memakai less/more dalam perbandingan.

B. more faster
Bagian ini salah karena mencampur more dan -er. Bentuk yang benar cukup faster.

C. before most shops
Bagian ini benar sebagai awal time clause.

D. had opened
Bagian ini benar karena menunjukkan kejadian yang sudah selesai sebelum kereta tiba.

Jebakan TOEFL
More faster terdengar seperti “lebih cepat,” tetapi grammar-nya salah. Gunakan salah satu: more + adjective panjang atau adjective pendek + -er.

Catatan cepat
faster than, bukan more faster than.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The morning train to the coastal town = subject.*
- *was less crowded than the afternoon bus = comparison pertama.*
- *was faster than the small ferry = comparison kedua.*
- *arrived at the station = verb phrase tambahan.*
- *before most shops... had opened = time clause.*
correctedSentence: The morning train to the coastal town was less crowded than the afternoon bus, but it was faster than the small ferry and arrived at the station before most shops along the harbor road had opened.

questionText: During the rainy season, each street vendor near the bus terminal should bring [B] a plastic sheet for the table, keep dry matches inside [C] a small tin box, and carry [A] waterproof cover for the food basket [D] when the wind becomes strong.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji article pada singular countable noun. Noun singular yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

carry waterproof cover

Noun utama dalam frasa itu adalah cover. Kata waterproof hanya adjective yang menjelaskan cover. Karena cover adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

carry a waterproof cover

Kalimat ini juga memiliki tiga aksi setelah modal should:

should bring
should keep
should carry

Ketiga verb itu sudah benar sebagai base verb setelah modal should. Masalahnya bukan pada verb carry, tetapi pada noun phrase yang menjadi object-nya.
explanation.whyCorrect:
waterproof cover
Bagian ini salah karena cover adalah singular countable noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah a waterproof cover.

optionAnalysis.A:
waterproof cover
Bagian ini salah karena cover adalah singular countable noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah a waterproof cover.
optionAnalysis.B:
a plastic sheet
Bagian ini benar. Sheet adalah singular countable noun dan sudah memakai article a.
optionAnalysis.C:
a small tin box
Bagian ini juga benar karena box singular countable dan sudah memiliki article a.
optionAnalysis.D:
when the wind becomes strong
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause. Ada subject the wind dan verb becomes.

explanation.toeflTrap: Adjective seperti waterproof sering membuat noun phrase terlihat lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner. Noun cover tetap membutuhkan article.
explanation.quickNote: a waterproof cover, bukan waterproof cover.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W8 — Article with Singular Countable Noun

Soal
During the rainy season, each street vendor near the bus terminal should bring [B] a plastic sheet for the table, keep dry matches inside [C] a small tin box, and carry [A] waterproof cover for the food basket [D] when the wind becomes strong.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
waterproof cover

Perbaikan
a waterproof cover

Kalimat benar
During the rainy season, each street vendor near the bus terminal should bring a plastic sheet for the table, keep dry matches inside a small tin box, and carry a waterproof cover for the food basket when the wind becomes strong.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji article pada singular countable noun. Noun singular yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

carry waterproof cover

Noun utama dalam frasa itu adalah cover. Kata waterproof hanya adjective yang menjelaskan cover. Karena cover adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

carry a waterproof cover

Kalimat ini juga memiliki tiga aksi setelah modal should:

should bring
should keep
should carry

Ketiga verb itu sudah benar sebagai base verb setelah modal should. Masalahnya bukan pada verb carry, tetapi pada noun phrase yang menjadi object-nya.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• During the rainy season = time phrase.
• each street vendor near the bus terminal = subject singular.
• should bring, keep, and carry = parallel verbs setelah modal.
• a plastic sheet, a small tin box, a waterproof cover = object noun phrases.
• when the wind becomes strong = adverb clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
B. a plastic sheet
Bagian ini benar. Sheet adalah singular countable noun dan sudah memakai article a.

C. a small tin box
Bagian ini juga benar karena box singular countable dan sudah memiliki article a.

D. when the wind becomes strong
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause. Ada subject the wind dan verb becomes.

A. waterproof cover
Bagian ini salah karena cover adalah singular countable noun. Bentuk yang benar adalah a waterproof cover.

Jebakan TOEFL
Adjective seperti waterproof sering membuat noun phrase terlihat lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner. Noun cover tetap membutuhkan article.

Catatan cepat
a waterproof cover, bukan waterproof cover.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *During the rainy season = time phrase.*
- *each street vendor near the bus terminal = subject singular.*
- *should bring, keep, and carry = parallel verbs setelah modal.*
- *a plastic sheet, a small tin box, a waterproof cover = object noun phrases.*
- *when the wind becomes strong = adverb clause.*
correctedSentence: During the rainy season, each street vendor near the bus terminal should bring a plastic sheet for the table, keep dry matches inside a small tin box, and carry a waterproof cover for the food basket when the wind becomes strong.

questionText: After several lanterns fell during the night parade, the festival committee recommended that every lantern [B] is checked before it was hung above the street, especially those placed [A] near crowded corners or tied [D] to bamboo poles beside the musicians’ stage [C] at the town square.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive passive setelah verb recommend. Bentuk pasifnya adalah be + V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Kata kuncinya adalah:

recommended that

Setelah verb seperti recommend, suggest, insist, demand, request, dan urge, TOEFL sering menguji mandative subjunctive. Dalam pola ini, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

every lantern
