Lantern tidak mengecek dirinya sendiri. Lentera itu harus dicek oleh seseorang. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam mandative subjunctive, bentuk pasifnya bukan is checked, melainkan:

be checked

Walaupun every lantern singular, be tetap tidak berubah menjadi is. Inilah ciri penting subjunctive.
explanation.whyCorrect:
is checked
Bagian ini salah karena setelah recommended that, bentuk formal yang dipakai adalah subjunctive passive: be checked.

optionAnalysis.A:
near crowded corners
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menunjukkan lokasi.
optionAnalysis.B:
is checked
Bagian ini salah karena setelah recommended that, bentuk formal yang dipakai adalah subjunctive passive: be checked.
optionAnalysis.C:
at the town square
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.
optionAnalysis.D:
to bamboo poles
Bagian ini benar. Pola yang tepat adalah tied to something.

explanation.toeflTrap: Subject singular every lantern membuat is checked terasa natural. Namun setelah recommended that, bentuk TOEFL yang diuji adalah be checked.
explanation.quickNote: recommended that every lantern be checked.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W9 — Mandative Subjunctive Passive

Soal
After several lanterns fell during the night parade, the festival committee recommended that every lantern [B] is checked before it was hung above the street, especially those placed [A] near crowded corners or tied [D] to bamboo poles beside the musicians’ stage [C] at the town square.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
is checked

Perbaikan
be checked

Kalimat benar
After several lanterns fell during the night parade, the festival committee recommended that every lantern be checked before it was hung above the street, especially those placed near crowded corners or tied to bamboo poles beside the musicians’ stage at the town square.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive passive setelah verb recommend. Bentuk pasifnya adalah be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kata kuncinya adalah:

recommended that

Setelah verb seperti recommend, suggest, insist, demand, request, dan urge, TOEFL sering menguji mandative subjunctive. Dalam pola ini, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

every lantern

Lantern tidak mengecek dirinya sendiri. Lentera itu harus dicek oleh seseorang. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam mandative subjunctive, bentuk pasifnya bukan is checked, melainkan:

be checked

Walaupun every lantern singular, be tetap tidak berubah menjadi is. Inilah ciri penting subjunctive.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• After several lanterns fell... = adverb clause.
• the festival committee = subject utama.
• recommended = verb utama.
• that every lantern be checked = mandative subjunctive passive.
• before it was hung above the street = time clause.
• those placed... or tied... = reduced passive modifiers.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. near crowded corners
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menunjukkan lokasi.

D. to bamboo poles
Bagian ini benar. Pola yang tepat adalah tied to something.

B. is checked
Bagian ini salah karena setelah recommended that, bentuk formal yang dipakai adalah subjunctive passive: be checked.

C. at the town square
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.

Jebakan TOEFL
Subject singular every lantern membuat is checked terasa natural. Namun setelah recommended that, bentuk TOEFL yang diuji adalah be checked.

Catatan cepat
recommended that every lantern be checked.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *After several lanterns fell... = adverb clause.*
- *the festival committee = subject utama.*
- *recommended = verb utama.*
- *that every lantern be checked = mandative subjunctive passive.*
- *before it was hung above the street = time clause.*
- *those placed... or tied... = reduced passive modifiers.*
correctedSentence: After several lanterns fell during the night parade, the festival committee recommended that every lantern be checked before it was hung above the street, especially those placed near crowded corners or tied to bamboo poles beside the musicians’ stage at the town square.

questionText: The small courtyard [D] which the dancers practiced for the ceremony was shaded by mango trees, decorated with paper lanterns, and surrounded by houses [C] whose balconies faced the temple gate [B] across the street from the old fountain [A] near the market.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu tidak boleh hilang.
explanation.reasoning:
Noun yang dijelaskan adalah:

The small courtyard

Lalu muncul klausa:

which the dancers practiced

Agar tahu apakah klausa itu lengkap, kita kembalikan ke kalimat dasar:

The dancers practiced in the courtyard.

Dalam konteks tempat, verb practiced membutuhkan preposition in. Jadi ketika courtyard menjadi noun yang dijelaskan di depan, preposition in harus tetap muncul dalam relative clause:

the courtyard in which the dancers practiced

Karena courtyard adalah tempat, bentuk where the dancers practiced juga bisa diterima. Namun untuk TOEFL formal, in which sangat kuat.
explanation.whyCorrect:
which the dancers practiced
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang benar adalah in which the dancers practiced atau where the dancers practiced.

optionAnalysis.A:
near the market
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan tempat tambahan.
optionAnalysis.B:
across the street
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan posisi temple gate.
optionAnalysis.C:
whose balconies
Bagian ini benar. Whose menunjukkan hubungan kepemilikan: balconies milik houses.
optionAnalysis.D:
which the dancers practiced
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang benar adalah in which the dancers practiced atau where the dancers practiced.

explanation.toeflTrap: Relative clause sering tampak hampir benar, tetapi ternyata kehilangan preposition. Kembalikan ke pola asal: practice in a courtyard.
explanation.quickNote: practice in the courtyard → the courtyard in which they practiced.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W10 — Relative Clause with Preposition

Soal
The small courtyard [D] which the dancers practiced for the ceremony was shaded by mango trees, decorated with paper lanterns, and surrounded by houses [C] whose balconies faced the temple gate [B] across the street from the old fountain [A] near the market.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
which the dancers practiced

Perbaikan
in which the dancers practiced / where the dancers practiced

Kalimat benar
The small courtyard in which the dancers practiced for the ceremony was shaded by mango trees, decorated with paper lanterns, and surrounded by houses whose balconies faced the temple gate across the street from the old fountain near the market.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu tidak boleh hilang.

Cara membaca kalimat
Noun yang dijelaskan adalah:

The small courtyard

Lalu muncul klausa:

which the dancers practiced

Agar tahu apakah klausa itu lengkap, kita kembalikan ke kalimat dasar:

The dancers practiced in the courtyard.

Dalam konteks tempat, verb practiced membutuhkan preposition in. Jadi ketika courtyard menjadi noun yang dijelaskan di depan, preposition in harus tetap muncul dalam relative clause:

the courtyard in which the dancers practiced

Karena courtyard adalah tempat, bentuk where the dancers practiced juga bisa diterima. Namun untuk TOEFL formal, in which sangat kuat.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The small courtyard = subject utama.
• in which the dancers practiced for the ceremony = relative clause.
• was shaded, decorated, and surrounded = passive verb phrases yang sejajar.
• houses whose balconies faced... = noun + relative clause.
• across the street... near the market = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. whose balconies
Bagian ini benar. Whose menunjukkan hubungan kepemilikan: balconies milik houses.

B. across the street
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan posisi temple gate.

A. near the market
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan tempat tambahan.

D. which the dancers practiced
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang benar adalah in which the dancers practiced atau where the dancers practiced.

Jebakan TOEFL
Relative clause sering tampak hampir benar, tetapi ternyata kehilangan preposition. Kembalikan ke pola asal: practice in a courtyard.

Catatan cepat
practice in the courtyard → the courtyard in which they practiced.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The small courtyard = subject utama.*
- *in which the dancers practiced for the ceremony = relative clause.*
- *was shaded, decorated, and surrounded = passive verb phrases yang sejajar.*
- *houses whose balconies faced... = noun + relative clause.*
- *across the street... near the market = keterangan tempat.*
correction: in which the dancers practiced / where the dancers practiced
correctedSentence: The small courtyard in which the dancers practiced for the ceremony was shaded by mango trees, decorated with paper lanterns, and surrounded by houses whose balconies faced the temple gate across the street from the old fountain near the market.

questionText: Although the mountain village is famous for [A] its stone houses, narrow lanes, and evening markets, many visitors remember [B] the peaceful of the valley at sunrise more clearly than the meals they ate [D] at small cafés or the souvenirs they bought [C] near the bus stop.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji word form. Setelah the dalam pola the ___ of, kalimat biasanya membutuhkan noun, bukan adjective.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

the peaceful of the valley

Kata peaceful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini benar jika digunakan untuk menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a peaceful valley
a peaceful morning

Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang diingat oleh visitors adalah “kedamaian” lembah pada saat matahari terbit. Posisi setelah the dan sebelum of membutuhkan noun. Karena itu, bentuk yang tepat adalah:

the peace of the valley

atau:

the peacefulness of the valley

Kalimat ini membandingkan hal yang paling diingat pengunjung: bukan hanya makanan atau suvenir, tetapi suasana damai lembah saat sunrise.
explanation.whyCorrect:
the peaceful of
Bagian ini salah karena peaceful adalah adjective. Bentuk noun yang dibutuhkan adalah peace atau peacefulness.

optionAnalysis.A:
its stone houses
Bagian ini benar. Its menunjukkan kepemilikan village terhadap stone houses.
optionAnalysis.B:
the peaceful of
Bagian ini salah karena peaceful adalah adjective. Bentuk noun yang dibutuhkan adalah peace atau peacefulness.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the bus stop
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat untuk souvenirs they bought.
optionAnalysis.D:
at small cafés
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat untuk meals they ate.

explanation.toeflTrap: TOEFL sering memakai kata yang akarnya familiar, tetapi bentuk katanya salah. Jangan hanya mengenali makna; lihat apakah posisinya membutuhkan noun, adjective, verb, atau adverb.
explanation.quickNote: a peaceful valley, tetapi the peace of the valley.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W11 — Word Form: Noun vs Adjective

Soal
Although the mountain village is famous for [A] its stone houses, narrow lanes, and evening markets, many visitors remember [B] the peaceful of the valley at sunrise more clearly than the meals they ate [D] at small cafés or the souvenirs they bought [C] near the bus stop.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
the peaceful of

Perbaikan
the peace of / the peacefulness of

Kalimat benar
Although the mountain village is famous for its stone houses, narrow lanes, and evening markets, many visitors remember the peace of the valley at sunrise more clearly than the meals they ate at small cafés or the souvenirs they bought near the bus stop.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji word form. Setelah the dalam pola the ___ of, kalimat biasanya membutuhkan noun, bukan adjective.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

the peaceful of the valley

Kata peaceful adalah adjective. Bentuk ini benar jika digunakan untuk menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a peaceful valley
a peaceful morning

Namun dalam kalimat ini, yang diingat oleh visitors adalah “kedamaian” lembah pada saat matahari terbit. Posisi setelah the dan sebelum of membutuhkan noun. Karena itu, bentuk yang tepat adalah:

the peace of the valley

atau:

the peacefulness of the valley

Kalimat ini membandingkan hal yang paling diingat pengunjung: bukan hanya makanan atau suvenir, tetapi suasana damai lembah saat sunrise.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Although the mountain village is famous for... = subordinate clause.
• many visitors = subject klausa utama.
• remember = verb utama.
• the peace of the valley at sunrise = object.
• more clearly than... = comparative phrase.
• the meals they ate / the souvenirs they bought = dua hal pembanding.

Analisis bagian A–D
A. its stone houses
Bagian ini benar. Its menunjukkan kepemilikan village terhadap stone houses.

B. the peaceful of
Bagian ini salah karena peaceful adalah adjective. Bentuk noun yang dibutuhkan adalah peace atau peacefulness.

D. at small cafés
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat untuk meals they ate.

C. near the bus stop
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat untuk souvenirs they bought.

Jebakan TOEFL
TOEFL sering memakai kata yang akarnya familiar, tetapi bentuk katanya salah. Jangan hanya mengenali makna; lihat apakah posisinya membutuhkan noun, adjective, verb, atau adverb.

Catatan cepat
a peaceful valley, tetapi the peace of the valley.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Although the mountain village is famous for... = subordinate clause.*
- *many visitors = subject klausa utama.*
- *remember = verb utama.*
- *the peace of the valley at sunrise = object.*
- *more clearly than... = comparative phrase.*
- *the meals they ate / the souvenirs they bought = dua hal pembanding.*
correction: the peace of / the peacefulness of
correctedSentence: Although the mountain village is famous for its stone houses, narrow lanes, and evening markets, many visitors remember the peace of the valley at sunrise more clearly than the meals they ate at small cafés or the souvenirs they bought near the bus stop.

questionText: The community group was responsible [D] for cleaning the riverbank after the festival, collecting broken glass from the grass, and [B] to preserving the young trees that had been planted by students [C] beside the walking path [A] near the bridge.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji gerund setelah preposition dan parallel structure. Setelah responsible for, aktivitas harus berbentuk V-ing.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian utama kalimat adalah:

The community group was responsible for...

Setelah preposition for, jika ada aktivitas, bentuknya harus gerund. Kalimat ini menyebutkan tiga tanggung jawab:

cleaning the riverbank
collecting broken glass
preserving the young trees

Dua bentuk pertama sudah benar sebagai gerund: cleaning dan collecting. Maka bentuk ketiga juga harus gerund: preserving.

Bagian to preserving salah karena mencampur to dengan gerund. Jika memakai to, bentuk setelahnya seharusnya base verb, tetapi pola responsible for sendiri menuntut gerund, bukan infinitive.
explanation.whyCorrect:
to preserving
Bagian ini salah karena tidak mengikuti pola responsible for + V-ing dan tidak sejajar dengan cleaning serta collecting. Bentuk yang benar adalah preserving.

optionAnalysis.A:
near the bridge
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat tambahan.
optionAnalysis.B:
to preserving
Bagian ini salah karena tidak mengikuti pola responsible for + V-ing dan tidak sejajar dengan cleaning serta collecting. Bentuk yang benar adalah preserving.
optionAnalysis.C:
beside the walking path
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.
optionAnalysis.D:
for cleaning
Bagian ini benar karena setelah preposition for, verb memakai bentuk V-ing.

explanation.toeflTrap: Bentuk to dan -ing sering dicampur. Setelah preposition seperti for, in, on, about, dan of, gunakan gerund.
explanation.quickNote: responsible for preserving, bukan responsible for to preserve.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W12 — Gerund after Preposition

Soal
The community group was responsible [D] for cleaning the riverbank after the festival, collecting broken glass from the grass, and [B] to preserving the young trees that had been planted by students [C] beside the walking path [A] near the bridge.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
to preserving

Perbaikan
preserving

Kalimat benar
The community group was responsible for cleaning the riverbank after the festival, collecting broken glass from the grass, and preserving the young trees that had been planted by students beside the walking path near the bridge.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji gerund setelah preposition dan parallel structure. Setelah responsible for, aktivitas harus berbentuk V-ing.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian utama kalimat adalah:

The community group was responsible for...

Setelah preposition for, jika ada aktivitas, bentuknya harus gerund. Kalimat ini menyebutkan tiga tanggung jawab:

cleaning the riverbank
collecting broken glass
preserving the young trees

Dua bentuk pertama sudah benar sebagai gerund: cleaning dan collecting. Maka bentuk ketiga juga harus gerund: preserving.

Bagian to preserving salah karena mencampur to dengan gerund. Jika memakai to, bentuk setelahnya seharusnya base verb, tetapi pola responsible for sendiri menuntut gerund, bukan infinitive.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The community group = subject.
• was responsible for = predicate adjective + preposition.
• cleaning, collecting, and preserving = gerund parallel.
• that had been planted by students = relative clause pasif.
• beside the walking path near the bridge = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. for cleaning
Bagian ini benar karena setelah preposition for, verb memakai bentuk V-ing.

C. beside the walking path
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.

B. to preserving
Bagian ini salah karena tidak mengikuti pola responsible for + V-ing dan tidak sejajar dengan cleaning serta collecting. Bentuk yang benar adalah preserving.

A. near the bridge
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat tambahan.

Jebakan TOEFL
Bentuk to dan -ing sering dicampur. Setelah preposition seperti for, in, on, about, dan of, gunakan gerund.

Catatan cepat
responsible for preserving, bukan responsible for to preserve.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The community group = subject.*
- *was responsible for = predicate adjective + preposition.*
- *cleaning, collecting, and preserving = gerund parallel.*
- *that had been planted by students = relative clause pasif.*
- *beside the walking path near the bridge = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: The community group was responsible for cleaning the riverbank after the festival, collecting broken glass from the grass, and preserving the young trees that had been planted by students beside the walking path near the bridge.

questionText: Because the old paintings in the palace hall are sensitive to heat and smoke, they should [D] be moved during repairs, must [C] protect from direct sunlight, and ought to be stored [A] in a dry room until the ceiling above them [B] has been fixed.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji passive voice with modal. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya adalah modal + be + V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Subject utama pada klausa kedua adalah:

they

Kata they merujuk pada:

the old paintings in the palace hall

Lukisan-lukisan itu tidak melakukan aksi protect. Lukisan-lukisan itu harus dilindungi dari sinar matahari langsung. Karena subject menerima aksi, bentuk yang benar adalah pasif:

must be protected

Kalimat ini juga membentuk rangkaian passive structure yang sejajar:

should be moved
must be protected
ought to be stored

Bagian C salah karena hanya memakai must protect, yaitu bentuk aktif. Untuk subject paintings, makna aktif itu tidak cocok.
explanation.whyCorrect:
protect
Bagian ini salah karena must protect adalah active voice. Karena subject-nya paintings, bentuk yang benar adalah must be protected.

optionAnalysis.A:
in a dry room
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat penyimpanan.
optionAnalysis.B:
has been fixed
Bagian ini benar karena ceiling menerima aksi perbaikan. Bentuk present perfect passive juga cocok dengan konteks sampai perbaikan selesai.
optionAnalysis.C:
protect
Bagian ini salah karena must protect adalah active voice. Karena subject-nya paintings, bentuk yang benar adalah must be protected.
optionAnalysis.D:
be moved
*Bagian ini benar. Setelah modal should, passive voice memakai be + V3.*

explanation.toeflTrap: Setelah modal, verb memang kembali ke base form. Namun jika maknanya pasif, base form yang muncul adalah be, lalu diikuti V3.
explanation.quickNote: must be protected, bukan must protect.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W13 — Passive Voice with Modal

Soal
Because the old paintings in the palace hall are sensitive to heat and smoke, they should [D] be moved during repairs, must [C] protect from direct sunlight, and ought to be stored [A] in a dry room until the ceiling above them [B] has been fixed.

Jawaban benar: C

Bagian salah
protect

Perbaikan
be protected

Kalimat benar
Because the old paintings in the palace hall are sensitive to heat and smoke, they should be moved during repairs, must be protected from direct sunlight, and ought to be stored in a dry room until the ceiling above them has been fixed.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji passive voice with modal. Jika subject menerima aksi, bentuknya adalah modal + be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Subject utama pada klausa kedua adalah:

they

Kata they merujuk pada:

the old paintings in the palace hall

Lukisan-lukisan itu tidak melakukan aksi protect. Lukisan-lukisan itu harus dilindungi dari sinar matahari langsung. Karena subject menerima aksi, bentuk yang benar adalah pasif:

must be protected

Kalimat ini juga membentuk rangkaian passive structure yang sejajar:

should be moved
must be protected
ought to be stored

Bagian C salah karena hanya memakai must protect, yaitu bentuk aktif. Untuk subject paintings, makna aktif itu tidak cocok.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Because the old paintings... are sensitive... = reason clause.
• they = subject klausa utama.
• should be moved = modal passive pertama.
• must be protected = modal passive kedua.
• ought to be stored = modal-like passive ketiga.
• until the ceiling... has been fixed = time clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. be moved
Bagian ini benar. Setelah modal should, passive voice memakai be + V3.

A. in a dry room
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat penyimpanan.

B. has been fixed
Bagian ini benar karena ceiling menerima aksi perbaikan. Bentuk present perfect passive juga cocok dengan konteks sampai perbaikan selesai.

C. protect
Bagian ini salah karena must protect adalah active voice. Karena subject-nya paintings, bentuk yang benar adalah must be protected.

Jebakan TOEFL
Setelah modal, verb memang kembali ke base form. Namun jika maknanya pasif, base form yang muncul adalah be, lalu diikuti V3.

Catatan cepat
must be protected, bukan must protect.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Because the old paintings... are sensitive... = reason clause.*
- *they = subject klausa utama.*
- *should be moved = modal passive pertama.*
- *must be protected = modal passive kedua.*
- *ought to be stored = modal-like passive ketiga.*
- *until the ceiling... has been fixed = time clause.*
correctedSentence: Because the old paintings in the palace hall are sensitive to heat and smoke, they should be moved during repairs, must be protected from direct sunlight, and ought to be stored in a dry room until the ceiling above them has been fixed.

questionText: The weekend program encouraged teenagers not only [D] to clean plastic from the beach before the tide rose but also [A] teaching younger children how floating trash could harm turtles, seabirds, and fish [C] along the coast during the windy season [B] after the monsoon began.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji parallel structure dalam pola not only...but also. Elemen setelah kedua pasangan itu harus sejajar.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini memakai pola:

*encouraged teenagers not only to clean... but also to teach...*

Program itu mendorong teenagers melakukan dua hal:

to clean plastic from the beach
to teach younger children

*Bagian pertama setelah not only memakai infinitive:*

to clean

*Maka bagian setelah but also juga harus memakai infinitive:*

to teach

Bentuk teaching tidak sejajar. Secara makna, teaching masih berhubungan dengan aktivitas mengajar, tetapi bentuk grammar-nya tidak cocok dengan to clean.
explanation.whyCorrect:
teaching
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to clean. Setelah but also, bentuk yang tepat adalah to teach.

optionAnalysis.A:
teaching
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to clean. Setelah but also, bentuk yang tepat adalah to teach.
optionAnalysis.B:
after the monsoon began
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause of time.
optionAnalysis.C:
along the coast
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.
optionAnalysis.D:
to clean
Bagian ini benar karena menjadi elemen pertama dalam struktur parallel.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam not only...but also, jangan hanya melihat arti. Bentuk grammar di kiri dan kanan harus sama jenisnya.
explanation.quickNote: *not only to clean but also to teach.*
explanation.sourceNotes:
W14 — Correlative Conjunction and Parallel Structure

Soal
The weekend program encouraged teenagers not only [D] to clean plastic from the beach before the tide rose but also [A] teaching younger children how floating trash could harm turtles, seabirds, and fish [C] along the coast during the windy season [B] after the monsoon began.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
teaching

Perbaikan
to teach

Kalimat benar
The weekend program encouraged teenagers not only to clean plastic from the beach before the tide rose but also to teach younger children how floating trash could harm turtles, seabirds, and fish along the coast during the windy season after the monsoon began.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji parallel structure dalam pola not only...but also. Elemen setelah kedua pasangan itu harus sejajar.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini memakai pola:

encouraged teenagers not only to clean... but also to teach...

Program itu mendorong teenagers melakukan dua hal:

to clean plastic from the beach
to teach younger children

Bagian pertama setelah not only memakai infinitive:

to clean

Maka bagian setelah but also juga harus memakai infinitive:

to teach

Bentuk teaching tidak sejajar. Secara makna, teaching masih berhubungan dengan aktivitas mengajar, tetapi bentuk grammar-nya tidak cocok dengan to clean.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The weekend program = subject.
• encouraged teenagers = verb + object.
• not only to clean... but also to teach... = parallel infinitive structure.
• how floating trash could harm... = noun clause setelah teach.
• along the coast during the windy season... = keterangan tempat dan waktu.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. to clean
Bagian ini benar karena menjadi elemen pertama dalam struktur parallel.

A. teaching
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to clean. Setelah but also, bentuk yang tepat adalah to teach.

C. along the coast
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.

B. after the monsoon began
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause of time.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam not only...but also, jangan hanya melihat arti. Bentuk grammar di kiri dan kanan harus sama jenisnya.

Catatan cepat
not only to clean but also to teach.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The weekend program = subject.*
- *encouraged teenagers = verb + object.*
- *not only to clean... but also to teach... = parallel infinitive structure.*
- *how floating trash could harm... = noun clause setelah teach.*
- *along the coast during the windy season... = keterangan tempat dan waktu.*
correctedSentence: The weekend program encouraged teenagers not only to clean plastic from the beach before the tide rose but also to teach younger children how floating trash could harm turtles, seabirds, and fish along the coast during the windy season after the monsoon began.

questionText: If the hikers [D] had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark, they [B] would reach the village guesthouse before the heavy rain flooded the lower path and made the wooden steps [A] too slippery for anyone [C] carrying a backpack.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian if-clause adalah:

If the hikers had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark

Bentuk had left menunjukkan past perfect. Ini menandakan bahwa kalimat sedang membicarakan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau dibayangkan berbeda.

Dalam conditional type 3, pola lengkapnya adalah:

*If + subject + had + V3, subject + would have + V3*

Karena if-clause memakai had left, klausa hasilnya harus memakai:

*would have reached*

Bukan:

would reach

Would reach lebih cocok untuk hypothetical present/future, misalnya:

If they left earlier, they would reach the guesthouse.

*Namun untuk masa lalu, bentuk yang benar adalah would have reached.*
explanation.whyCorrect:
would reach
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sesuai dengan conditional masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have reached.

optionAnalysis.A:
too slippery
*Bagian ini benar. Polanya adalah too + adjective + for someone.*
optionAnalysis.B:
would reach
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sesuai dengan conditional masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have reached.
optionAnalysis.C:
carrying a backpack
Bagian ini benar sebagai reduced active relative clause dari anyone who was carrying a backpack.
optionAnalysis.D:
had left
Bagian ini benar karena conditional type 3 memakai past perfect dalam if-clause.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kalau if-clause memakai had + V3, jangan pasangkan dengan would + V1. Untuk situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi, pasangannya adalah would have + V3.
explanation.quickNote: *If S had V3, S would have V3.*
explanation.sourceNotes:
W15 — Conditional Type 3

Soal
If the hikers [D] had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark, they [B] would reach the village guesthouse before the heavy rain flooded the lower path and made the wooden steps [A] too slippery for anyone [C] carrying a backpack.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
would reach

Perbaikan
would have reached

Kalimat benar
If the hikers had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark, they would have reached the village guesthouse before the heavy rain flooded the lower path and made the wooden steps too slippery for anyone carrying a backpack.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian if-clause adalah:

If the hikers had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark

Bentuk had left menunjukkan past perfect. Ini menandakan bahwa kalimat sedang membicarakan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau dibayangkan berbeda.

Dalam conditional type 3, pola lengkapnya adalah:

If + subject + had + V3, subject + would have + V3

Karena if-clause memakai had left, klausa hasilnya harus memakai:

would have reached

Bukan:

would reach

Would reach lebih cocok untuk hypothetical present/future, misalnya:

If they left earlier, they would reach the guesthouse.

Namun untuk masa lalu, bentuk yang benar adalah would have reached.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• If the hikers had left... = past perfect if-clause.
• they would have reached... = result clause conditional type 3.
• before the heavy rain flooded... = time clause.
• made the wooden steps too slippery... = verb phrase lanjutan.
• carrying a backpack = reduced active modifier untuk anyone.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. had left
Bagian ini benar karena conditional type 3 memakai past perfect dalam if-clause.

A. too slippery
Bagian ini benar. Polanya adalah too + adjective + for someone.

B. would reach
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sesuai dengan conditional masa lalu. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have reached.

C. carrying a backpack
Bagian ini benar sebagai reduced active relative clause dari anyone who was carrying a backpack.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kalau if-clause memakai had + V3, jangan pasangkan dengan would + V1. Untuk situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi, pasangannya adalah would have + V3.

Catatan cepat
If S had V3, S would have V3.

TOEFL ITP Written Expression — Batch 2
Soal W16–W30

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *If the hikers had left... = past perfect if-clause.*
- *they would have reached... = result clause conditional type 3.*
- *before the heavy rain flooded... = time clause.*
- *made the wooden steps too slippery... = verb phrase lanjutan.*
- *carrying a backpack = reduced active modifier untuk anyone.*
correctedSentence: If the hikers had left the waterfall before the sky turned dark, they would have reached the village guesthouse before the heavy rain flooded the lower path and made the wooden steps too slippery for anyone carrying a backpack.

questionText: The wooden platform beside the river, [C] decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves, became the place [D] which the musicians performed during the harvest ceremony [A] after the guests arrived [B] from villages upstream.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu harus tetap muncul dalam relative clause.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang bermasalah adalah:

the place which the musicians performed

Sekilas, which terasa cukup karena the place adalah noun yang dijelaskan. Namun kita perlu mengecek pola asalnya terlebih dahulu. Para musisi tidak “performed the place.” Mereka tampil di atas platform itu.

Kalimat dasarnya adalah:

The musicians performed on the wooden platform.

Karena perform dalam konteks tempat pertunjukan membutuhkan preposition on, maka saat platform/place dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan, preposition on harus ikut muncul:

the place on which the musicians performed
explanation.whyCorrect:
which the musicians performed
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition on. Pola asalnya adalah performed on the platform, sehingga bentuk formal yang benar adalah on which the musicians performed.

optionAnalysis.A:
after the guests arrived
Bagian ini benar karena after diikuti klausa lengkap: the guests sebagai subject dan arrived sebagai verb.
optionAnalysis.B:
from villages upstream
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan asal para tamu.
optionAnalysis.C:
decorated
Bagian ini benar karena platform menerima aksi dekorasi. Bentuk decorated berfungsi sebagai reduced passive modifier dari platform.
optionAnalysis.D:
which the musicians performed
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition on. Pola asalnya adalah performed on the platform, sehingga bentuk formal yang benar adalah on which the musicians performed.

explanation.toeflTrap: Which sering terlihat cukup karena noun sebelumnya adalah tempat. Namun TOEFL sering menguji preposition yang tersembunyi dari pola asal verb.
explanation.quickNote: perform on the platform → the platform on which they performed.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W16 — Relative Clause with Preposition

Soal
The wooden platform beside the river, [C] decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves, became the place [D] which the musicians performed during the harvest ceremony [A] after the guests arrived [B] from villages upstream.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
which the musicians performed

Perbaikan
on which the musicians performed

Kalimat benar
The wooden platform beside the river, decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves, became the place on which the musicians performed during the harvest ceremony after the guests arrived from villages upstream.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu harus tetap muncul dalam relative clause.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang bermasalah adalah:

the place which the musicians performed

Sekilas, which terasa cukup karena the place adalah noun yang dijelaskan. Namun kita perlu mengecek pola asalnya terlebih dahulu. Para musisi tidak “performed the place.” Mereka tampil di atas platform itu.

Kalimat dasarnya adalah:

The musicians performed on the wooden platform.

Karena perform dalam konteks tempat pertunjukan membutuhkan preposition on, maka saat platform/place dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan, preposition on harus ikut muncul:

the place on which the musicians performed

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The wooden platform beside the river = subject utama.
• decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves = reduced passive modifier.
• became = verb utama.
• the place on which the musicians performed = complement + relative clause.
• during the harvest ceremony = keterangan waktu.
• after the guests arrived from villages upstream = adverb clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. decorated
Bagian ini benar karena platform menerima aksi dekorasi. Bentuk decorated berfungsi sebagai reduced passive modifier dari platform.

A. after the guests arrived
Bagian ini benar karena after diikuti klausa lengkap: the guests sebagai subject dan arrived sebagai verb.

D. which the musicians performed
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition on. Pola asalnya adalah performed on the platform, sehingga bentuk formal yang benar adalah on which the musicians performed.

B. from villages upstream
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan asal para tamu.

Jebakan TOEFL
Which sering terlihat cukup karena noun sebelumnya adalah tempat. Namun TOEFL sering menguji preposition yang tersembunyi dari pola asal verb.

Catatan cepat
perform on the platform → the platform on which they performed.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The wooden platform beside the river = subject utama.*
- *decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves = reduced passive modifier.*
- *became = verb utama.*
- *the place on which the musicians performed = complement + relative clause.*
- *during the harvest ceremony = keterangan waktu.*
- *after the guests arrived from villages upstream = adverb clause.*
correctedSentence: The wooden platform beside the river, decorated with oil lamps and woven palm leaves, became the place on which the musicians performed during the harvest ceremony after the guests arrived from villages upstream.

questionText: The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee [C] drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal [D] often remind older residents of childhood mornings, especially when the first buses arrive and the vendors arrange their carts [B] during the rainy season [A] before sunrise.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement. Verb utama harus mengikuti head subject, bukan noun plural yang muncul dalam modifier.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian awal kalimat tampak panjang:

The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal

Di dalam bagian ini ada beberapa noun yang bisa mengecoh:

bananas
coffee
stalls

Namun head subject kalimat bukan bananas, coffee, atau stalls. Subject utamanya adalah:

The smell

Karena smell singular, verb utama juga harus singular:

The smell reminds older residents...

Bukan:

The smell remind older residents...

Bagian of fried bananas and sweet coffee hanya menjelaskan smell itu berasal dari apa. Bagian drifting from the stalls juga hanya modifier yang menjelaskan smell.
explanation.whyCorrect:
often remind
Bagian ini salah karena subject utama The smell berbentuk singular. Verb simple present yang benar adalah often reminds.

optionAnalysis.A:
before sunrise
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu tambahan.
optionAnalysis.B:
during the rainy season
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.C:
drifting
Bagian ini benar karena menjelaskan smell yang menyebar dari stalls. Bentuk drifting berfungsi sebagai reduced active modifier.
optionAnalysis.D:
often remind
Bagian ini salah karena subject utama The smell berbentuk singular. Verb simple present yang benar adalah often reminds.

explanation.toeflTrap: Plural noun yang dekat dengan verb sering menipu. Jangan mengikuti bananas, coffee, atau stalls. Cari head subject-nya: smell.
explanation.quickNote: The smell ... reminds, bukan The smell ... remind.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W17 — Subject–Verb Agreement with Long Modifier

Soal
The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee [C] drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal [D] often remind older residents of childhood mornings, especially when the first buses arrive and the vendors arrange their carts [B] during the rainy season [A] before sunrise.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
often remind

Perbaikan
often reminds

Kalimat benar
The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal often reminds older residents of childhood mornings, especially when the first buses arrive and the vendors arrange their carts during the rainy season before sunrise.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji subject–verb agreement. Verb utama harus mengikuti head subject, bukan noun plural yang muncul dalam modifier.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian awal kalimat tampak panjang:

The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal

Di dalam bagian ini ada beberapa noun yang bisa mengecoh:

bananas
coffee
stalls

Namun head subject kalimat bukan bananas, coffee, atau stalls. Subject utamanya adalah:

The smell

Karena smell singular, verb utama juga harus singular:

The smell reminds older residents...

Bukan:

The smell remind older residents...

Bagian of fried bananas and sweet coffee hanya menjelaskan smell itu berasal dari apa. Bagian drifting from the stalls juga hanya modifier yang menjelaskan smell.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The smell = head subject singular.
• of fried bananas and sweet coffee = prepositional phrase.
• drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal = participial modifier.
• often reminds = verb utama singular.
• older residents = object.
• of childhood mornings = prepositional complement.
• especially when... = adverb clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. drifting
Bagian ini benar karena menjelaskan smell yang menyebar dari stalls. Bentuk drifting berfungsi sebagai reduced active modifier.

D. often remind
Bagian ini salah karena subject utama The smell berbentuk singular. Verb simple present yang benar adalah often reminds.

B. during the rainy season
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

A. before sunrise
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan waktu tambahan.

Jebakan TOEFL
Plural noun yang dekat dengan verb sering menipu. Jangan mengikuti bananas, coffee, atau stalls. Cari head subject-nya: smell.

Catatan cepat
The smell ... reminds, bukan The smell ... remind.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The smell = head subject singular.*
- *of fried bananas and sweet coffee = prepositional phrase.*
- *drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal = participial modifier.*
- *often reminds = verb utama singular.*
- *older residents = object.*
- *of childhood mornings = prepositional complement.*
- *especially when... = adverb clause.*
correctedSentence: The smell of fried bananas and sweet coffee drifting from the stalls near the bus terminal often reminds older residents of childhood mornings, especially when the first buses arrive and the vendors arrange their carts during the rainy season before sunrise.

questionText: Several clay pots from the old kitchen [C] near the back wall, [B] were discovered beneath the floor during a renovation, were later placed in a glass case beside photographs of the family who had lived there [A] for three generations [D] before the house became a museum.

choices.D: before the house became a museum

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, relative clause pasif dapat dipersingkat menjadi V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat utama sebenarnya adalah:

Several clay pots were later placed in a glass case.

Subject-nya adalah Several clay pots, dan verb utama kalimat adalah were later placed.

Bagian di tengah hanya menjelaskan pot-pot itu:

discovered beneath the floor during a renovation

Pot-pot itu tidak menemukan sesuatu. Pot-pot itu ditemukan. Karena maknanya pasif, bentuk V3 discovered sudah tepat sebagai modifier.

Jika memakai were discovered, kalimat akan memiliki dua finite passive verbs:

were discovered
were later placed

Tanpa connector yang tepat, dua finite verbs seperti ini membuat struktur kalimat rusak.
explanation.whyCorrect:
were discovered
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru sebelum verb utama were later placed. Bentuk yang tepat adalah discovered sebagai reduced passive modifier.

optionAnalysis.A:
for three generations
Bagian ini benar karena menunjukkan durasi keluarga tersebut tinggal di sana.
optionAnalysis.B:
were discovered
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru sebelum verb utama were later placed. Bentuk yang tepat adalah discovered sebagai reduced passive modifier.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the back wall
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi untuk old kitchen.
optionAnalysis.D:
before the house became a museum
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause of time.

explanation.toeflTrap: Finite passive seperti were discovered memang terlihat benar secara makna. Namun dalam posisi modifier, TOEFL sering mengharapkan V3 saja, bukan be + V3.
explanation.quickNote: pots discovered beneath the floor were placed....
explanation.sourceNotes:
W18 — Reduced Passive Relative Clause

Soal
Several clay pots from the old kitchen [C] near the back wall, [B] were discovered beneath the floor during a renovation, were later placed in a glass case beside photographs of the family who had lived there [A] for three generations [D] before the house became a museum.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
were discovered

Perbaikan
discovered

Kalimat benar
Several clay pots from the old kitchen near the back wall, discovered beneath the floor during a renovation, were later placed in a glass case beside photographs of the family who had lived there for three generations before the house became a museum.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji reduced passive relative clause. Jika noun menerima aksi, relative clause pasif dapat dipersingkat menjadi V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat utama sebenarnya adalah:

Several clay pots were later placed in a glass case.

Subject-nya adalah Several clay pots, dan verb utama kalimat adalah were later placed.

Bagian di tengah hanya menjelaskan pot-pot itu:

discovered beneath the floor during a renovation

Pot-pot itu tidak menemukan sesuatu. Pot-pot itu ditemukan. Karena maknanya pasif, bentuk V3 discovered sudah tepat sebagai modifier.

Jika memakai were discovered, kalimat akan memiliki dua finite passive verbs:

were discovered
were later placed

Tanpa connector yang tepat, dua finite verbs seperti ini membuat struktur kalimat rusak.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Several clay pots from the old kitchen near the back wall = subject utama.
• discovered beneath the floor during a renovation = reduced passive modifier.
• were later placed = verb utama pasif.
• in a glass case = keterangan tempat.
• beside photographs... = prepositional phrase.
• who had lived there... = relative clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. near the back wall
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi untuk old kitchen.

A. for three generations
Bagian ini benar karena menunjukkan durasi keluarga tersebut tinggal di sana.

B. were discovered
Bagian ini salah karena menambahkan finite verb baru sebelum verb utama were later placed. Bentuk yang tepat adalah discovered sebagai reduced passive modifier.

D. before the house became a museum
Bagian ini benar sebagai adverb clause of time.

Jebakan TOEFL
Finite passive seperti were discovered memang terlihat benar secara makna. Namun dalam posisi modifier, TOEFL sering mengharapkan V3 saja, bukan be + V3.

Catatan cepat
pots discovered beneath the floor were placed....

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Several clay pots from the old kitchen near the back wall = subject utama.*
- *discovered beneath the floor during a renovation = reduced passive modifier.*
- *were later placed = verb utama pasif.*
- *in a glass case = keterangan tempat.*
- *beside photographs... = prepositional phrase.*
- *who had lived there... = relative clause.*
correctedSentence: Several clay pots from the old kitchen near the back wall, discovered beneath the floor during a renovation, were later placed in a glass case beside photographs of the family who had lived there for three generations before the house became a museum.

questionText: To reduce waste during the school fair, the student committee encouraged visitors [C] to bring their own cups, [B] carrying reusable bags, and [D] to separate leftover food from paper plates before leaving the field [A] behind the library.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji parallel structure. Dalam daftar aktivitas setelah encouraged visitors, bentuk grammar setiap aktivitas harus sejajar.
explanation.reasoning:
Pola dasarnya adalah:

encourage someone to do something

Dalam kalimat ini, committee mendorong visitors melakukan tiga hal:

to bring their own cups
to carry reusable bags
to separate leftover food from paper plates

Bagian pertama dan ketiga sudah memakai infinitive: to bring dan to separate. Maka bagian kedua juga harus memakai infinitive:

to carry

Bentuk carrying memang punya makna “membawa,” tetapi tidak sejajar dengan dua bentuk lainnya.
explanation.whyCorrect:
carrying
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to bring dan to separate. Bentuk yang benar adalah to carry.

optionAnalysis.A:
behind the library
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi field.
optionAnalysis.B:
carrying
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to bring dan to separate. Bentuk yang benar adalah to carry.
optionAnalysis.C:
to bring
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti pola encourage someone to do something.
optionAnalysis.D:
to separate
Bagian ini benar dan sejajar dengan to bring.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam daftar panjang, satu item sering sengaja dibuat berbeda bentuk. Jangan hanya membaca arti; cek apakah bentuk grammar setiap bagian sejajar.
explanation.quickNote: to bring, to carry, and to separate.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W19 — Parallel Structure with Infinitives

Soal
To reduce waste during the school fair, the student committee encouraged visitors [C] to bring their own cups, [B] carrying reusable bags, and [D] to separate leftover food from paper plates before leaving the field [A] behind the library.

Jawaban benar: B

Bagian salah
carrying

Perbaikan
to carry

Kalimat benar
To reduce waste during the school fair, the student committee encouraged visitors to bring their own cups, to carry reusable bags, and to separate leftover food from paper plates before leaving the field behind the library.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji parallel structure. Dalam daftar aktivitas setelah encouraged visitors, bentuk grammar setiap aktivitas harus sejajar.

Cara membaca kalimat
Pola dasarnya adalah:

encourage someone to do something

Dalam kalimat ini, committee mendorong visitors melakukan tiga hal:

to bring their own cups
to carry reusable bags
to separate leftover food from paper plates

Bagian pertama dan ketiga sudah memakai infinitive: to bring dan to separate. Maka bagian kedua juga harus memakai infinitive:

to carry

Bentuk carrying memang punya makna “membawa,” tetapi tidak sejajar dengan dua bentuk lainnya.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• To reduce waste during the school fair = purpose phrase.
• the student committee = subject.
• encouraged visitors = verb + object.
• to bring, to carry, and to separate = infinitive phrases yang sejajar.
• before leaving the field = time phrase.
• behind the library = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. to bring
Bagian ini benar karena mengikuti pola encourage someone to do something.

B. carrying
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sejajar dengan to bring dan to separate. Bentuk yang benar adalah to carry.

D. to separate
Bagian ini benar dan sejajar dengan to bring.

A. behind the library
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan lokasi field.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam daftar panjang, satu item sering sengaja dibuat berbeda bentuk. Jangan hanya membaca arti; cek apakah bentuk grammar setiap bagian sejajar.

Catatan cepat
to bring, to carry, and to separate.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *To reduce waste during the school fair = purpose phrase.*
- *the student committee = subject.*
- *encouraged visitors = verb + object.*
- *to bring, to carry, and to separate = infinitive phrases yang sejajar.*
- *before leaving the field = time phrase.*
- *behind the library = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: To reduce waste during the school fair, the student committee encouraged visitors to bring their own cups, to carry reusable bags, and to separate leftover food from paper plates before leaving the field behind the library.

questionText: The new teacher wanted to know [A] how could the students reach the old observatory on the hill, so she asked the caretaker for directions [D] before the afternoon rain began and wrote the route [C] on the classroom board [B] beside the weekly schedule.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji urutan kata dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, urutannya adalah question word + subject + auxiliary/verb, bukan pola pertanyaan langsung.
explanation.reasoning:
Kalimat ini bukan pertanyaan langsung. Guru itu ingin mengetahui “bagaimana para siswa bisa mencapai observatorium lama.”

Pertanyaan langsungnya adalah:

How could the students reach the old observatory?

Namun setelah wanted to know, bagian itu menjadi noun clause sebagai object. Dalam noun clause, auxiliary could tidak boleh berada sebelum subject.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

how the students could reach the old observatory
explanation.whyCorrect:
how could the students reach
Bagian ini salah karena memakai word order pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah how the students could reach.

optionAnalysis.A:
how could the students reach
Bagian ini salah karena memakai word order pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah how the students could reach.
optionAnalysis.B:
beside the weekly schedule
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan lokasi tambahan.
optionAnalysis.C:
on the classroom board
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan tempat menulis route.
optionAnalysis.D:
before the afternoon rain began
Bagian ini benar karena before diikuti klausa lengkap: the afternoon rain sebagai subject dan began sebagai verb.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kata how sering membuat peserta ingin memakai inversion. Ingat, setelah wanted to know, clause itu bukan pertanyaan langsung, melainkan object.
explanation.quickNote:
Direct question: How could they reach it?
Noun clause: how they could reach it.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W20 — Noun Clause Word Order

Soal
The new teacher wanted to know [A] how could the students reach the old observatory on the hill, so she asked the caretaker for directions [D] before the afternoon rain began and wrote the route [C] on the classroom board [B] beside the weekly schedule.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
how could the students reach

Perbaikan
how the students could reach

Kalimat benar
The new teacher wanted to know how the students could reach the old observatory on the hill, so she asked the caretaker for directions before the afternoon rain began and wrote the route on the classroom board beside the weekly schedule.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji urutan kata dalam noun clause. Dalam embedded question, urutannya adalah question word + subject + auxiliary/verb, bukan pola pertanyaan langsung.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kalimat ini bukan pertanyaan langsung. Guru itu ingin mengetahui “bagaimana para siswa bisa mencapai observatorium lama.”

Pertanyaan langsungnya adalah:

How could the students reach the old observatory?

Namun setelah wanted to know, bagian itu menjadi noun clause sebagai object. Dalam noun clause, auxiliary could tidak boleh berada sebelum subject.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

how the students could reach the old observatory

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The new teacher = subject.
• wanted to know = verb phrase.
• how the students could reach... = noun clause sebagai object.
• so she asked... and wrote... = coordinate clauses.
• before the afternoon rain began = adverb clause.
• on the classroom board beside the weekly schedule = keterangan tempat.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. before the afternoon rain began
Bagian ini benar karena before diikuti klausa lengkap: the afternoon rain sebagai subject dan began sebagai verb.

C. on the classroom board
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan tempat menulis route.

B. beside the weekly schedule
Bagian ini juga benar sebagai keterangan lokasi tambahan.

A. how could the students reach
Bagian ini salah karena memakai word order pertanyaan langsung. Dalam noun clause, bentuk yang benar adalah how the students could reach.

Jebakan TOEFL
Kata how sering membuat peserta ingin memakai inversion. Ingat, setelah wanted to know, clause itu bukan pertanyaan langsung, melainkan object.

Catatan cepat
Direct question: How could they reach it?
Noun clause: how they could reach it.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The new teacher = subject.*
- *wanted to know = verb phrase.*
- *how the students could reach... = noun clause sebagai object.*
- *so she asked... and wrote... = coordinate clauses.*
- *before the afternoon rain began = adverb clause.*
- *on the classroom board beside the weekly schedule = keterangan tempat.*
correctedSentence: The new teacher wanted to know how the students could reach the old observatory on the hill, so she asked the caretaker for directions before the afternoon rain began and wrote the route on the classroom board beside the weekly schedule.

questionText: Before entering the bat cave, each visitor must wear [A] protective helmet, carry a small flashlight, and follow the guide quietly because sudden noise can disturb the animals [D] resting above the path [B] during the day [C] near the entrance.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji article sebelum singular countable noun. Noun tunggal yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

wear protective helmet

Kata protective hanya adjective yang menjelaskan noun. Noun utamanya adalah helmet. Karena helmet adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

wear a protective helmet

Kalimat ini juga memiliki tiga verb sejajar setelah modal must:

must wear
must carry
must follow

Ketiganya sudah benar sebagai base verb setelah modal. Masalahnya ada pada noun phrase setelah wear.
explanation.whyCorrect:
protective helmet
Bagian ini salah karena helmet singular countable tidak boleh berdiri tanpa article. Bentuk yang benar adalah a protective helmet.

optionAnalysis.A:
protective helmet
Bagian ini salah karena helmet singular countable tidak boleh berdiri tanpa article. Bentuk yang benar adalah a protective helmet.
optionAnalysis.B:
during the day
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.C:
near the entrance
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.
optionAnalysis.D:
resting
Bagian ini benar karena menjelaskan animals yang sedang beristirahat. Bentuk resting berfungsi sebagai reduced active relative clause.

explanation.toeflTrap: Adjective sebelum noun sering membuat noun phrase tampak lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner. Noun helmet tetap membutuhkan article.
explanation.quickNote: a protective helmet, bukan protective helmet.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W21 — Article with Singular Countable Noun

Soal
Before entering the bat cave, each visitor must wear [A] protective helmet, carry a small flashlight, and follow the guide quietly because sudden noise can disturb the animals [D] resting above the path [B] during the day [C] near the entrance.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
protective helmet

Perbaikan
a protective helmet

Kalimat benar
Before entering the bat cave, each visitor must wear a protective helmet, carry a small flashlight, and follow the guide quietly because sudden noise can disturb the animals resting above the path during the day near the entrance.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji article sebelum singular countable noun. Noun tunggal yang bisa dihitung biasanya membutuhkan article atau determiner.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

wear protective helmet

Kata protective hanya adjective yang menjelaskan noun. Noun utamanya adalah helmet. Karena helmet adalah singular countable noun, ia tidak boleh berdiri sendiri tanpa article.

Bentuk yang benar adalah:

wear a protective helmet

Kalimat ini juga memiliki tiga verb sejajar setelah modal must:

must wear
must carry
must follow

Ketiganya sudah benar sebagai base verb setelah modal. Masalahnya ada pada noun phrase setelah wear.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• Before entering the bat cave = introductory phrase.
• each visitor = subject singular.
• must wear, carry, and follow = parallel verbs setelah modal.
• a protective helmet = object pertama.
• because sudden noise can disturb... = reason clause.
• animals resting above the path... = noun + participial modifier.

Analisis bagian A–D
D. resting
Bagian ini benar karena menjelaskan animals yang sedang beristirahat. Bentuk resting berfungsi sebagai reduced active relative clause.

B. during the day
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

A. protective helmet
Bagian ini salah karena helmet singular countable tidak boleh berdiri tanpa article. Bentuk yang benar adalah a protective helmet.

C. near the entrance
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat.

Jebakan TOEFL
Adjective sebelum noun sering membuat noun phrase tampak lengkap. Padahal adjective bukan determiner. Noun helmet tetap membutuhkan article.

Catatan cepat
a protective helmet, bukan protective helmet.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *Before entering the bat cave = introductory phrase.*
- *each visitor = subject singular.*
- *must wear, carry, and follow = parallel verbs setelah modal.*
- *a protective helmet = object pertama.*
- *because sudden noise can disturb... = reason clause.*
- *animals resting above the path... = noun + participial modifier.*
correctedSentence: Before entering the bat cave, each visitor must wear a protective helmet, carry a small flashlight, and follow the guide quietly because sudden noise can disturb the animals resting above the path during the day near the entrance.

questionText: The calligrapher wrote the final line [A] careful on a strip of handmade paper, waited for the ink to dry, and then placed the finished poem [C] inside a wooden frame that had been carved [D] by his grandfather [B] many years earlier.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji perbedaan adjective dan adverb. Jika kata menjelaskan verb, bentuk yang digunakan harus adverb.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

wrote the final line careful

Kata careful adalah adjective. Adjective menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a careful artist
a careful movement

Namun dalam kalimat ini, kata tersebut menjelaskan bagaimana calligrapher menulis. Yang dijelaskan adalah verb wrote, sehingga bentuk yang tepat adalah adverb:

wrote the final line carefully

Kalimat ini juga memiliki rangkaian verb utama:

wrote
waited
placed

Jadi carefully berfungsi khusus menjelaskan cara aksi wrote dilakukan.
explanation.whyCorrect:
careful
Bagian ini salah karena adjective dipakai untuk menjelaskan verb wrote. Bentuk yang benar adalah carefully.

optionAnalysis.A:
careful
Bagian ini salah karena adjective dipakai untuk menjelaskan verb wrote. Bentuk yang benar adalah carefully.
optionAnalysis.B:
many years earlier
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.
optionAnalysis.C:
inside a wooden frame
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan tempat poem diletakkan.
optionAnalysis.D:
by his grandfather
Bagian ini benar sebagai agent phrase dalam passive voice.

explanation.toeflTrap: Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “hati-hati” tidak berubah bentuk. Dalam bahasa Inggris, fungsi kata menentukan bentuk: adjective untuk noun, adverb untuk verb.
explanation.quickNote: write carefully, bukan write careful.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W22 — Adjective and Adverb

Soal
The calligrapher wrote the final line [A] careful on a strip of handmade paper, waited for the ink to dry, and then placed the finished poem [C] inside a wooden frame that had been carved [D] by his grandfather [B] many years earlier.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
careful

Perbaikan
carefully

Kalimat benar
The calligrapher wrote the final line carefully on a strip of handmade paper, waited for the ink to dry, and then placed the finished poem inside a wooden frame that had been carved by his grandfather many years earlier.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji perbedaan adjective dan adverb. Jika kata menjelaskan verb, bentuk yang digunakan harus adverb.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

wrote the final line careful

Kata careful adalah adjective. Adjective menjelaskan noun, misalnya:

a careful artist
a careful movement

Namun dalam kalimat ini, kata tersebut menjelaskan bagaimana calligrapher menulis. Yang dijelaskan adalah verb wrote, sehingga bentuk yang tepat adalah adverb:

wrote the final line carefully

Kalimat ini juga memiliki rangkaian verb utama:

wrote
waited
placed

Jadi carefully berfungsi khusus menjelaskan cara aksi wrote dilakukan.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The calligrapher = subject.
• wrote, waited, and placed = rangkaian verb utama.
• carefully = adverb yang menjelaskan wrote.
• on a strip of handmade paper = keterangan media/tempat.
• that had been carved by his grandfather... = relative clause pasif.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. inside a wooden frame
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan tempat poem diletakkan.

D. by his grandfather
Bagian ini benar sebagai agent phrase dalam passive voice.

B. many years earlier
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu.

A. careful
Bagian ini salah karena adjective dipakai untuk menjelaskan verb wrote. Bentuk yang benar adalah carefully.

Jebakan TOEFL
Dalam bahasa Indonesia, “hati-hati” tidak berubah bentuk. Dalam bahasa Inggris, fungsi kata menentukan bentuk: adjective untuk noun, adverb untuk verb.

Catatan cepat
write carefully, bukan write careful.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The calligrapher = subject.*
- *wrote, waited, and placed = rangkaian verb utama.*
- *carefully = adverb yang menjelaskan wrote.*
- *on a strip of handmade paper = keterangan media/tempat.*
- *that had been carved by his grandfather... = relative clause pasif.*
correctedSentence: The calligrapher wrote the final line carefully on a strip of handmade paper, waited for the ink to dry, and then placed the finished poem inside a wooden frame that had been carved by his grandfather many years earlier.

questionText: The small blue house [A] which the poet lived during his final years has been repaired by the town council, although the narrow garden [C] behind it and the stone path [B] leading to the gate still look almost exactly as they did [D] in old photographs.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal verb membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu harus tetap ada.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian yang salah adalah:

The small blue house which the poet lived

Untuk mengecek apakah relative clause ini lengkap, kita kembalikan ke kalimat dasarnya:

The poet lived in the small blue house.

Dalam bahasa Inggris, kita mengatakan live in a house, bukan live a house. Karena itu, saat house dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan di depan, preposition in harus ikut muncul:

The small blue house in which the poet lived

Karena house adalah tempat, bentuk where the poet lived juga bisa diterima. Namun dalam gaya TOEFL formal, in which lebih kuat.
explanation.whyCorrect:
which the poet lived
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang tepat adalah in which the poet lived atau where the poet lived.

optionAnalysis.A:
which the poet lived
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang tepat adalah in which the poet lived atau where the poet lived.
optionAnalysis.B:
leading to the gate
Bagian ini benar karena stone path melakukan fungsi “leading to the gate.” Bentuk leading adalah reduced active modifier.
optionAnalysis.C:
behind it
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi garden.
optionAnalysis.D:
in old photographs
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat dalam konteks comparison.

explanation.toeflTrap: Which saja tidak selalu cukup. Cek pola asal verb-nya: live in a house, bukan live a house.
explanation.quickNote: live in the house → the house in which he lived.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W23 — Relative Clause with Preposition

Soal
The small blue house [A] which the poet lived during his final years has been repaired by the town council, although the narrow garden [C] behind it and the stone path [B] leading to the gate still look almost exactly as they did [D] in old photographs.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
which the poet lived

Perbaikan
in which the poet lived / where the poet lived

Kalimat benar
The small blue house in which the poet lived during his final years has been repaired by the town council, although the narrow garden behind it and the stone path leading to the gate still look almost exactly as they did in old photographs.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji relative clause dengan preposition. Jika pola asal verb membutuhkan preposition, preposition itu harus tetap ada.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian yang salah adalah:

The small blue house which the poet lived

Untuk mengecek apakah relative clause ini lengkap, kita kembalikan ke kalimat dasarnya:

The poet lived in the small blue house.

Dalam bahasa Inggris, kita mengatakan live in a house, bukan live a house. Karena itu, saat house dijadikan noun yang dijelaskan di depan, preposition in harus ikut muncul:

The small blue house in which the poet lived

Karena house adalah tempat, bentuk where the poet lived juga bisa diterima. Namun dalam gaya TOEFL formal, in which lebih kuat.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• The small blue house = subject utama.
• in which the poet lived during his final years = relative clause.
• has been repaired = verb utama pasif.
• although... still look... = contrast clause.
• leading to the gate = reduced active relative clause.
• as they did in old photographs = comparison clause.

Analisis bagian A–D
C. behind it
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi garden.

B. leading to the gate
Bagian ini benar karena stone path melakukan fungsi “leading to the gate.” Bentuk leading adalah reduced active modifier.

A. which the poet lived
Bagian ini salah karena kehilangan preposition in. Bentuk yang tepat adalah in which the poet lived atau where the poet lived.

D. in old photographs
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan tempat dalam konteks comparison.

Jebakan TOEFL
Which saja tidak selalu cukup. Cek pola asal verb-nya: live in a house, bukan live a house.

Catatan cepat
live in the house → the house in which he lived.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *The small blue house = subject utama.*
- *in which the poet lived during his final years = relative clause.*
- *has been repaired = verb utama pasif.*
- *although... still look... = contrast clause.*
- *leading to the gate = reduced active relative clause.*
- *as they did in old photographs = comparison clause.*
correction: in which the poet lived / where the poet lived
correctedSentence: The small blue house in which the poet lived during his final years has been repaired by the town council, although the narrow garden behind it and the stone path leading to the gate still look almost exactly as they did in old photographs.

questionText: After several cracks appeared near the clock tower, the mayor requested that the old clock [A] was repaired before the anniversary parade, while the workers inspected the balcony [B] above the main gate and covered the sidewalk [D] with wooden barriers [C] for public safety.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive passive setelah verb request. Dalam pola formal, bentuk pasifnya adalah be + V3.
explanation.reasoning:
Kata kuncinya adalah:

requested that

Setelah verb seperti request, recommend, suggest, insist, demand, dan urge, TOEFL sering menguji subjunctive. Dalam pola ini, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

the old clock

Jam tua itu tidak memperbaiki dirinya sendiri. Jam itu harus diperbaiki oleh orang lain. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam mandative subjunctive, bentuk pasif yang benar adalah:

be repaired

Bukan:

was repaired

Walaupun the old clock singular dan konteksnya lampau, bentuk be tetap tidak berubah dalam subjunctive formal.
explanation.whyCorrect:
was repaired
Bagian ini salah karena setelah requested that, bentuk formalnya adalah be repaired, bukan passive past biasa.

optionAnalysis.A:
was repaired
Bagian ini salah karena setelah requested that, bentuk formalnya adalah be repaired, bukan passive past biasa.
optionAnalysis.B:
above the main gate
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan posisi balcony.
optionAnalysis.C:
for public safety
Bagian ini benar sebagai purpose phrase.
optionAnalysis.D:
with wooden barriers
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan alat atau bahan untuk menutup sidewalk.

explanation.toeflTrap: Subject singular seperti the old clock membuat was repaired terasa menggoda. Namun setelah request that, pola TOEFL formalnya tetap be repaired.
explanation.quickNote: requested that the clock be repaired.
explanation.sourceNotes:
W24 — Mandative Subjunctive Passive

Soal
After several cracks appeared near the clock tower, the mayor requested that the old clock [A] was repaired before the anniversary parade, while the workers inspected the balcony [B] above the main gate and covered the sidewalk [D] with wooden barriers [C] for public safety.

Jawaban benar: A

Bagian salah
was repaired

Perbaikan
be repaired

Kalimat benar
After several cracks appeared near the clock tower, the mayor requested that the old clock be repaired before the anniversary parade, while the workers inspected the balcony above the main gate and covered the sidewalk with wooden barriers for public safety.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji mandative subjunctive passive setelah verb request. Dalam pola formal, bentuk pasifnya adalah be + V3.

Cara membaca kalimat
Kata kuncinya adalah:

requested that

Setelah verb seperti request, recommend, suggest, insist, demand, dan urge, TOEFL sering menguji subjunctive. Dalam pola ini, verb dalam that-clause memakai base form.

Subject dalam that-clause adalah:

the old clock

Jam tua itu tidak memperbaiki dirinya sendiri. Jam itu harus diperbaiki oleh orang lain. Jadi maknanya pasif. Dalam mandative subjunctive, bentuk pasif yang benar adalah:

be repaired

Bukan:

was repaired

Walaupun the old clock singular dan konteksnya lampau, bentuk be tetap tidak berubah dalam subjunctive formal.

Struktur kalimat setelah diperbaiki:

• After several cracks appeared... = adverb clause.
• the mayor = subject utama.
• requested = verb utama.
• that the old clock be repaired = mandative subjunctive passive.
• while the workers inspected... and covered... = adverb clause.
• for public safety = purpose phrase.

Analisis bagian A–D
B. above the main gate
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan posisi balcony.

A. was repaired
Bagian ini salah karena setelah requested that, bentuk formalnya adalah be repaired, bukan passive past biasa.

D. with wooden barriers
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan alat atau bahan untuk menutup sidewalk.

C. for public safety
Bagian ini benar sebagai purpose phrase.

Jebakan TOEFL
Subject singular seperti the old clock membuat was repaired terasa menggoda. Namun setelah request that, pola TOEFL formalnya tetap be repaired.

Catatan cepat
requested that the clock be repaired.

sentenceStructureExplanation:
- *After several cracks appeared... = adverb clause.*
- *the mayor = subject utama.*
- *requested = verb utama.*
- *that the old clock be repaired = mandative subjunctive passive.*
- *while the workers inspected... and covered... = adverb clause.*
- *for public safety = purpose phrase.*
correctedSentence: After several cracks appeared near the clock tower, the mayor requested that the old clock be repaired before the anniversary parade, while the workers inspected the balcony above the main gate and covered the sidewalk with wooden barriers for public safety.

questionText: If the ferry had arrived before the tide changed, the tourists [D] would see the island’s southern beach, the coral pools [C] along the rocks, and the old lighthouse that could be reached [B] only by walking across the sandbar [A] at low tide.

explanation.summary: Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.
explanation.reasoning:
Bagian if-clause adalah:

*If the ferry had arrived before the tide changed*

Bentuk had arrived menunjukkan past perfect. Ini adalah sinyal bahwa kalimat membicarakan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau hanya dibayangkan.

Dalam conditional type 3, pola lengkapnya adalah:

*If + subject + had + V3, subject + would have + V3*

*Karena if-clause memakai had arrived, klausa hasilnya harus memakai:*

*would have seen*

Bukan:

would see

Would see lebih cocok untuk hypothetical present/future, bukan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi.
explanation.whyCorrect:
would see
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sesuai dengan conditional type 3. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have seen.

optionAnalysis.A:
at low tide
Bagian ini benar sebagai keterangan waktu atau kondisi.
optionAnalysis.B:
only by walking
Bagian ini benar. Setelah preposition by, verb memakai gerund walking.
optionAnalysis.C:
along the rocks
Bagian ini benar sebagai prepositional phrase yang menjelaskan lokasi coral pools.
optionAnalysis.D:
would see
Bagian ini salah karena tidak sesuai dengan conditional type 3. Bentuk yang benar adalah would have seen.

explanation.toeflTrap: Kalau if-clause memakai had + V3, result clause harus memakai would have + V3. Jangan berhenti pada would + V1.
explanation.quickNote: *If S had V3, S would have V3.*
explanation.sourceNotes:
W25 — Conditional Type 3

Soal
If the ferry had arrived before the tide changed, the tourists [D] would see the island’s southern beach, the coral pools [C] along the rocks, and the old lighthouse that could be reached [B] only by walking across the sandbar [A] at low tide.

Jawaban benar: D

Bagian salah
would see

Perbaikan
would have seen

Kalimat benar
If the ferry had arrived before the tide changed, the tourists would have seen the island’s southern beach, the coral pools along the rocks, and the old lighthouse that could be reached only by walking across the sandbar at low tide.

Inti pola
Soal ini menguji conditional type 3, yaitu conditional untuk situasi hipotetis di masa lalu.

Cara membaca kalimat
Bagian if-clause adalah:

If the ferry had arrived before the tide changed

Bentuk had arrived menunjukkan past perfect. Ini adalah sinyal bahwa kalimat membicarakan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi atau hanya dibayangkan.
